## USER (2026-07-21 17:14:58)

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - User wants to completely overhaul existing Neuron vLLM setup and migrate to Docker-based deployment using new vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0 from https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-neuron/blob/release-0.21.0.1.0.0/docs/getting-started/setup-guide.md
   - Use official AWS Neuron Deep Learning Container (DLC) as base image
   - Run all services (clients, servers, retrievers, evaluation) inside a single container
   - User will set all configurations themselves
   - Maintain compatibility with existing compiled artifacts and scripts
   - Enable Claude Code to operate container via tmux send-keys

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - AWS Neuron Deep Learning Container (DLC) for vLLM 0.21.0
   - Docker containerization with host networking
   - Python 3.13 environment (from DLC)
   - Neuron SDK 2.31.0 / 2.26.6360 (compiler version discrepancy)
   - vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0.1.0.0
   - Volume mounting for project directory and artifacts
   - Auto-detection of Docker environment in bash scripts
   - Tmux integration for interactive container management
   - Multiple retrieval backends: BM25 (Pyserini), FAISS, ColBERT
   - Dependency resolution for Python 3.13 compatibility

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **docker/Dockerfile**
     - Custom image built on official AWS Neuron DLC
     - Base: `public.ecr.aws/neuron/pytorch-inference-vllm-neuronx:0.21.0.1.0.0-neuronx-py313-sdk2.31.0-ubuntu24.04`
     - Installs: Java 21, git, curl, wget, vim, tmux, htop, tree, less
     - Key snippet:
     ```dockerfile
     FROM public.ecr.aws/neuron/pytorch-inference-vllm-neuronx:0.21.0.1.0.0-neuronx-py313-sdk2.31.0-ubuntu24.04
     
     RUN apt-get update && \
         apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
             openjdk-21-jdk \
             git curl wget vim tmux htop tree less \
             && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
     
     ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64
     
     COPY docker/requirements.txt /tmp/requirements.txt
     RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r /tmp/requirements.txt && rm /tmp/requirements.txt
     
     RUN pip install --no-cache-dir --retries 5 --timeout 300 pyserini>=1.2.0 || true
     RUN pip install --no-cache-dir git+https://github.com/texttron/tevatron.git@main
     
     COPY docker/entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
     RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh
     
     WORKDIR /dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus
     ENTRYPOINT ["/entrypoint.sh"]
     CMD ["/bin/bash"]
     ```

   - **docker/entrypoint.sh**
     - Sets environment variables on container start
     - Key snippet:
     ```bash
     #!/bin/bash
     set -e
     
     export HF_TOKEN=[REDACTED]
     export HUGGINGFACE_HUB_TOKEN="${HUGGINGFACE_HUB_TOKEN:-$HF_TOKEN}"
     export HF_HOME="${HF_HOME:-/dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus/local-models/hf-cache}"
     export HF_DATASETS_CACHE="${HF_DATASETS_CACHE:-/dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus/local-models/hf-datasets}"
     export VLLM_CACHE_ROOT="${VLLM_CACHE_ROOT:-/dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus/local-models/vllm-cache}"
     export PYTHONPATH="/dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus:${PYTHONPATH:-}"
     
     if [ -f /dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus/.env ]; then
         set -a
         source /dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus/.env
         set +a
     fi
     
     exec "$@"
     ```

   - **docker/requirements.txt**
     - Project-specific dependencies (excluding packages in DLC and problematic ones)
     - Commented out: pyserini (installed separately), pylate (Python 3.13 incompatible), qwen-agent (conflicts with vLLM)
     - Key content:
     ```
     openai>=1.97.0
     anthropic>=0.58.2
     google-genai>=1.27.0
     google-auth>=2.40.3
     faiss-cpu>=1.11.0.post1
     fastmcp==2.9.2

     gspread>=6.2.1
     ```

   - **bash/docker/build.bash**
     - Builds Docker image with tag browsecomp-neuron:0.21.0
     - Key snippet:
     ```bash
     IMAGE_NAME="${IMAGE_NAME:-browsecomp-neuron}"
     IMAGE_TAG="${IMAGE_TAG:-0.21.0}"
     FULL_IMAGE_NAME="${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}"
     
     cd "$REPO_ROOT"
     docker build -f docker/Dockerfile -t "$FULL_IMAGE_NAME" .
     ```

   - **bash/docker/run.bash**
     - Launches interactive container with fixed name
     - Auto-detects and mounts all Neuron devices
     - Key snippet:
     ```bash
     CONTAINER_NAME="${CONTAINER_NAME:-browsecomp-neuron}"
     
     # Auto-detect Neuron devices
     NEURON_DEVICES=()
     for device in /dev/neuron*; do
         if [[ -c "$device" ]]; then
             NEURON_DEVICES+=("--device=$device:$device")
         fi
     done
     
     docker run -it \
         --name "$CONTAINER_NAME" \
         --network host \
         --privileged \
         "${NEURON_DEVICES[@]}" \
         -v "$REPO_ROOT:/dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus" \
         "$FULL_IMAGE_NAME"
     ```

   - **~/.bashrc** (modified)
     - Changed VLLM_CACHE_ROOT from `/dev3/zigeng/vLLM_cache` to `/dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus/local-models/vllm-cache`
     - This ensures cache is within mounted project directory

   - **bash/neuron/*.bash scripts** (8 files modified)
     - Added Docker environment auto-detection to all scripts using PYTHON_BIN
     - Pattern applied to: serve_tongyi.bash, serve_vllm_neuron.bash, compile_qwen3_32b_judge.bash, serve_qwen3_embedding.bash, run_tongyi_neuron.bash, n_tongyi.bash, n_tongyi_get.bash, evaluate_with_neuron_judge.bash
     - Key pattern:
     ```bash
     # Detect if running in Docker container
     if [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then
         PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"
     else
         PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron/bin/python}"
     fi
     ```

   - **DOCKER_MIGRATION_README.md**
     - Complete migration guide documenting the entire Docker setup
     - Includes quick start, troubleshooting, comparison tables, and workflows

   - **docker/install_optional_deps.sh**
     - Script to install optional dependencies if they failed during build
     - Currently checks and installs pyserini if missing

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **Error 1: Pyserini download timeout during Docker build**
     - Symptom: Connection reset while downloading 166MB pyserini-2.0.0.tar.gz
     - User feedback: No direct response, error occurred during build
     - Fix: Modified Dockerfile to install pyserini separately with longer timeout and retries, with fallback to manual installation in container
     - Code change: Split into separate RUN command with `--retries 5 --timeout 300` and `|| true` to not fail build

   - **Error 2: pylate[voyager] dependency conflict with Python 3.13**
     - Symptom: `pip` reported "no matching distributions available" for voyager package with Python 3.13
     - User feedback: "先不使用这个包" (Don't use this package for now)
     - Fix: Commented out pylate from requirements.txt with note about Python 3.13 incompatibility

   - **Error 3: qwen-agent breaking transformers version**
     - Symptom: qwen-agent downgraded transformers to 5.3.0, but vLLM-Neuron requires >=5.5.1
     - User feedback: User installed it manually and encountered the error
     - Fix: Uninstalled qwen-agent and qwen-omni-utils, force-reinstalled transformers to 5.14.1
     - Commands executed:
       ```bash
       pip uninstall -y qwen-agent qwen-omni-utils
       pip install --force-reinstall 'transformers>=5.5.1,<6.0.0'
       ```
     - Result: transformers 5.14.1 installed, vLLM compatibility restored

   - **Error 4: Missing peft package for tevatron**
     - Symptom: `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'peft'` when importing searchers
     - Fix: Installed peft package in container with `pip install peft`

5. Problem Solving:
   - **Solved: Complete Docker migration architecture**
     - Designed single-container solution with all services
     - Implemented auto-detection for Docker vs native environments
     - All existing bash scripts now work in both environments without modification
     - Successfully separated large/problematic dependencies (pyserini, pylate, qwen-agent) for optional installation

   - **Solved: Python 3.13 dependency compatibility issues**
     - Identified packages incompatible with Python 3.13 (pylate[voyager])
     - Identified packages that conflict with vLLM (qwen-agent)
     - Created fallback installation strategy with docker/install_optional_deps.sh

   - **Solved: Cache path management**
     - Centralized all cache paths within project directory
     - Modified ~/.bashrc to point to project-internal paths
     - Configured entrypoint.sh to set all cache environment variables

   - **Verified: Environment correctness**
     - Container uses official AWS Neuron DLC image for vLLM 0.21.0
     - vLLM version: 0.21.0
     - vLLM-Neuron version: 0.21.0.1.0.0
     - Python: 3.13.7
     - Neuron devices: 1 device with 4 cores detected and accessible
     - All retrieval backends working: BM25 (pyserini), FAISS, ReasonIR, ColBERT

do\n35\t        if [[ "$item" =~ ^([0-9]+)-([0-9]+)$ ]]; then\n36\t            start=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[1]}))\n37\t            end=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[2]}))\n38\t            if (( target >= start && target <= end )); then\n39\t                return 0\n40\t            fi\n41\t        elif [[ "$item" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] && (( target == 10#$item )); then\n42\t            return 0\n43\t        fi\n44\t    done\n45\t    return 1\n46\t}\n47\t\n48\t# The current custom artifact cannot chunk a cold prompt whose uncached suffix\n49\t# exceeds 16k, so only two long trajectories may retain each endpoint\'s APC\n50\t# state. Native scheduling uses chunked prefill and may use any replica.\n51\tPLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="${PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE:-}"\n52\tif [[ -z "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" ]]; then\n53\t    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "native" ]]; then\n54\t        PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="request"\n55\t    else\n56\t        PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="trajectory"\n57\t    fi\n58\tfi\n59\tcase "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" in\n60\t    custom | native) ;;\n61\t    *)\n62\t        echo "NEURON_SCHEDULER must be custom or native" >&2\n63\t        exit 2\n64\t        ;;\n65\tesac\n66\tcase "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" in\n67\t    trajectory | affinity | request) ;;\n68\t    *)\n69\t        echo "PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE must be trajectory, affinity, or request" >&2\n70\t        exit 2\n71\t        ;;\n72\tesac\n73\tcase "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" in\n74\t    0 | 1) ;;\n75\t    *)\n76\t        echo "ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR must be 0 or 1" >&2\n77\t        exit 2\n78\t        ;;\n79\tesac\n80\tcase "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" in\n81\t    0 | 1) ;;\n82\t    *)\n83\t        echo "ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS must be 0 or 1" >&2\n84\t        exit 2\n85\t        ;;\n86\tesac\n87\tif [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" && "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then\n88\t    echo "Choose either ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR or ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS, not both." >&2\n89\t    exit 2\n90\tfi\n91\t# TP=8, single-sequence artifact produced by compile_tongyi_tp8_s1.bash.\n92\tDEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/9a36595723d1059555571d3bf524fa88a507814a2efbe2917865b6350bb75912"\n93\texport NEURON_CACHE_TAG="${NEURON_CACHE_TAG:-tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1}"\n94\texport NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-$DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT}"\n95\tif [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "native" && "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" == "$DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT" ]]; then\n96\t    echo "NEURON_SCHEDULER=native requires a separately compiled native artifact; set NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS." >&2\n97\t    exit 2\n98\tfi\n99\tif [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "custom" \\\n100\t    && ( "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" == "request" || "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" == "affinity" ) ]]; then\n101\t    echo "custom scheduler requires trajectory leases: released KV blocks are evictable, so request or affinity leases can lose a long APC history and kill EngineCore. Use NEURON_SCHEDULER=native for non-trajectory leases." >&2\n102\t    exit 2\n103\tfi\n104\tif [[ ! -f "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS/model.pt" ]]; then\n105\t    echo "No complete Tongyi artifact at: $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" >&2\n106\t    echo "Compile the matching scheduler profile before starting runtime replicas." >&2\n107\t    exit 2\n108\tfi\n109\tif [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" ]]; then\n110\t    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" != "custom" || "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" != "trajectory" ]]; then\n111\t        echo "TP8 sidecar only supports custom scheduling with trajectory leases; compile a native TP8 artifact before mixing it with request leases." >&2\n112\t        exit 2\n113\t    fi\n114\t    if [[ "$TP_SIZE" != "16" || "$TONGYI_REPLICAS" != "3" || "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" != "2" ]]; then\n115\t        echo "TP8 sidecar requires the 3xTP16, MAX_NUM_SEQS=2 planning topology." >&2\n116\t        exit 2\n117\t    fi\n118\t    if [[ ! -f "$TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT/model.pt" ]]; then\n119\t        echo "No complete TP8 sidecar artifact at: $TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" >&2\n120\t        exit 2\n121\t    fi\n122\t    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_PORTS_WAS_SET" ]]; then\n123\t        PLANNING_PORTS="$PLANNING_PORTS,$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT"\n124\t    elif ! planning_ports_include "$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT"; then\n125\t        echo "PLANNING_PORTS must include TP8_SIDECAR_PORT=$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT when ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR=1." >&2\n126\t        exit 2\n127\t    fi\n128\t    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES" ]]; then\n129\t        PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES="${PORT}:2,$((PORT + 1)):2,$((PORT + 2)):2,${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}:1"\n130\t    fi\n131\tfi\n132\tif [[ "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then\n133\t    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" != "custom" || "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" != "trajectory" ]]; then\n134\t        echo "TP4 sidecars only support custom scheduling with trajectory leases; compile native TP4 artifacts before mixing them with request leases." >&2\n135\t        exit 2\n136\t    fi\n137\t    if [[ "$TP_SIZE" != "16" || "$TONGYI_REPLICAS" != "3" || "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" != "2" ]]; then\n138\t        echo "TP4 sidecars require the 3xTP16, MAX_NUM_SEQS=2 planning topology." >&2\n139\t        exit 2\n140\t    fi\n141\t    if [[ ! "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]] \\\n142\t        || [[ ! "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]] \\\n143\t        || (( TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1 > 65535 || TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2 > 65535 )) \\\n144\t        || [[ "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" == "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2" ]]; then\n145\t        echo "TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1 and TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2 must be distinct ports in 1..65535." >&2\n146\t        exit 2\n147\t    fi\n148\t    if [[ ! -f "$TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT/model.pt" ]]; then\n149\t        echo "No complete TP4 sidecar artifact at: $TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" >&2\n150\t        echo "Smoke the TP4 artifact before using this experimental topology." >&2\n151\t        exit 2\n152\t    fi\n153\t    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_PORTS_WAS_SET" ]]; then\n154\t        PLANNING_PORTS="$PLANNING_PORTS,$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1,$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2"\n155\t    elif ! planning_ports_include "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" \\\n156\t        || ! planning_ports_include "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2"; then\n157\t        echo "PLANNING_PORTS must include both TP4 sidecar ports when ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS=1." >&2\n158\t        exit 2\n159\t    fi\n160\t    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES" ]]; then\n161\t        PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES="${PORT}:2,$((PORT + 1)):2,$((PORT + 2)):2,${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1}:1,${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2}:1"\n162\t    fi\n163\tfi\n164\t\n165\t# Detect if running in Docker container\n166\tif [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then\n167\t    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"\n168\telse\n169\t    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"\n170\tfi\n171\tNUM_THREADS="${NUM_THREADS:-$((TONGYI_REPLICAS * 2))}"\n172\tRUN_EVAL="${RUN_EVAL:-1}"\n173\tEVAL_BATCH_SIZE="${EVAL_BATCH_SIZE:-32}"\n174\tMAX_QUERIES="${MAX_QUERIES:-}"\n175\tRUN_NAME="${RUN_NAME:-tongyi_filter_all_no_get}"\n176\tQREL_RUNS=(8 4 full)\n177\t# Previous full-qrels filter-non-positive variants. Keep as reference; this\n178\t# script now runs filter_all on 1/8, then 1/4, then the full qrels.\n179\t# VARIANTS="${VARIANTS:-saturate refer}"\n180\t\n181\tSTART_SERVER="${START_SERVER:-1}"\n182\tSTART_JUDGE_SERVER="${START_JUDGE_SERVER:-1}"\n183\tJUDGE_MODEL="${JUDGE_MODEL:-Qwen/Qwen3-32B}"\n184\tJUDGE_PORT="${JUDGE_PORT:-8032}"\n185\tJUDGE_REPLICAS="${JUDGE_REPLICAS:-16}"\n186\tJUDGE_TP_SIZE="${JUDGE_TP_SIZE:-4}"\n187\tJUDGE_MAX_MODEL_LEN="${JUDGE_MAX_MODEL_LEN:-8192}"\n188\tJUDGE_MAX_NUM_SEQS="${JUDGE_MAX_NUM_SEQS:-1}"\n189\tJUDGE_NUM_THREADS="${JUDGE_NUM_THREADS:-16}"\n190\tJUDGE_BASE_URLS="${JUDGE_BASE_URLS:-}"\n191\t\n192\tRUN_ROOT="${RUN_ROOT:-runs/qwen3-8b}"\n193\tCACHE_ROOT="${CACHE_ROOT:-cache/qwen3-8b}"\n194\tPLANNING_LOG_DIR="${PLANNING_LOG_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/logs/neuron-servers/$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)}"\n195\tPLANNING_RESTART_DIR="${PLANNING_RESTART_DIR:-$PLANNING_LOG_DIR/restarts}"\n196\tPLANNING_RESTART_TIMEOUT_SECONDS="${PLANNING_RESTART_TIMEOUT_SECONDS:-600}"\n197\tPLANNING_QUERY_RETRY_LIMIT="${PLANNING_QUERY_RETRY_LIMIT:-2}"\n198\tPLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS="${PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS:-}"\n199\tif [[ -z "$PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS" && "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "custom" ]]; then\n200\t    PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS=16384\n201\tfi\n202\tSUMMARIZE_NEURON_LOGS="${SUMMARIZE_NEURON_LOGS:-1}"\n203\t\n204\tTONGYI_PID=""\n205\tTP8_SIDECAR_PID=""\n206\tTP4_SIDECAR_PIDS=()\n207\tJUDGE_PID=""\n208\tPLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED=0\n209\t\n210\tcleanup_pid() {\n211\t    local pid="$1"\n212\t    if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then\n213\t        kill "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true\n214\t        wait "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true\n215\t    fi\n216\t}\n217\t\n218\tcleanup_pids() {\n219\t    local pid\n220\t    for pid in "$@"; do\n221\t        cleanup_pid "$pid"\n222\t    done\n223\t}\n224\t\n225\tsummarize_planning_logs() {\n226\t    local log logs=() summary_path temporary_path\n227\t\n228\t    [[ "$SUMMARIZE_NEURON_LOGS" == "1" ]] || return 0\n229\t    [[ "$START_SERVER" == "1" ]] || return 0\n230\t    [[ "$PLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED" == "0" ]] || return 0\n231\t\n232\t    for log in "$PLANNING_LOG_DIR"/tongyi-*.log; do\n233\t        [[ -f "$log" ]] && logs+=("$log")\n234\t    done\n235\t    (( ${#logs[@]} > 0 )) || return 0\n236\t\n237\t    summary_path="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR/planning_core_time.json"\n238\t    temporary_path="$summary_path.tmp.$$"\n239\t    if "$PYTHON_BIN" scripts/neuron_summarize_vllm_logs.py \\\n240\t        --year "$(date -u +%Y)" \\\n241\t        --json \\\n242\t        "${logs[@]}" >"$temporary_path"; then\n243\t        mv -- "$temporary_path" "$summary_path"\n244\t        echo "Planning slot-duty and vacancy summary: $summary_path"\n245\t        PLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED=1\n246\t    else\n247\t        rm -f -- "$temporary_path"\n248\t        echo "WARNING: could not summarize planning logs under $PLANNING_LOG_DIR" >&2\n249\t    fi\n250\t}\n251\t\n252\tcleanup() {\n253\t    cleanup_pid "$TONGYI_PID"\n254\t    cleanup_pid "$TP8_SIDECAR_PID"\n255\t    cleanup_pids "${TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS[@]}"\n256\t    summarize_planning_logs\n257\t    cleanup_pid "$JUDGE_PID"\n258\t}\n259\ttrap cleanup EXIT\n260\ttrap \'exit 130\' INT TERM\n261\t\n262\tqrel_dir_for_run() {\n263\t    case "$1" in\n264\t        8 | 4) printf "topics-qrels/topics-qrels-%s\\n" "$1" ;;\n265\t        full) printf "%s\\n" "topics-qrels" ;;\n266\t        *) echo "Unknown qrel run: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;\n267\t    esac\n268\t}\n269\t\n270\tqrel_label_for_run() {\n271\t    case "$1" in\n272\t        8 | 4) printf "%sqrel\\n" "$1" ;;\n273\t        full) printf "%s\\n" "full" ;;\n274\t        *) echo "Unknown qrel run: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;\n275\t    esac\n276\t}\n277\t\n278\tfor qrel_run in "${QREL_RUNS[@]}"; do\n279\t    qrel_dir="$(qrel_dir_for_run "$qrel_run")"\n280\t    for required_file in queries.tsv qrel_evidence.txt qrel_golds.txt; do\n281\t        if [[ ! -f "$qrel_dir/$required_file" ]]; then\n282\t            echo "Missing required file: $qrel_dir/$required_file" >&2\n283\t            exit 1\n284\t        fi\n285\t    done\n286\tdone\n287\t\n288\twait_for_server() {\n289\t    local pid="$1"\n290\t    local url="$2"\n291\t\n292\t    until curl -fsS "$url" >/dev/null; do\n293\t        if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && ! kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then\n294\t            wait "$pid"\n295\t            exit 1\n296\t        fi\n297\t        sleep 10\n298\t    done\n299\t}\n300\t\n301\twait_for_planning_endpoints() {\n302\t    local item start end port\n303\t    local endpoints=()\n304\t    IFS=, read -r -a endpoints <<< "$PLANNING_PORTS"\n305\t    for item in "${endpoints[@]}"; do\n306\t        if [[ "$item" =~ ^([0-9]+)-([0-9]+)$ ]]; then\n307\t            start=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[1]}))\n308\t            end=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[2]}))\n309\t            if (( start < 1 || end > 65535 || end < start )); then\n310\t                echo "Invalid planning port range: $item" >&2\n311\t                exit 2\n312\t            fi\n313\t            for ((port = start; port <= end; port++)); do\n314\t                wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models"\n315\t            done\n316\t        elif [[ "$item" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then\n317\t            port=$((10#$item))\n318\t            if (( port < 1 || port > 65535 )); then\n319\t                echo "Invalid planning port: $item" >&2\n320\t                exit 2\n321\t            fi\n322\t            wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models"\n323\t        else\n324\t            echo "Invalid planning port entry: $item" >&2\n325\t            exit 2\n326\t        fi\n327\t    done\n328\t}\n329\t\n330\tif [[ -z "$JUDGE_BASE_URLS" ]]; then\n331\t    judge_urls=()\n332\t    for ((replica = 0; replica < JUDGE_REPLICAS; replica++)); do\n333\t        judge_urls+=("http://127.0.0.1:$((JUDGE_PORT + replica))/v1")\n334\t    done\n335\t    JUDGE_BASE_URLS="$(IFS=,; echo "${judge_urls[*]}")"\n336\tfi\n337\t\n338\twait_for_url_list() {\n339\t    local raw_urls="$1"\n340\t    local urls=()\n341\t    local url\n342\t    IFS=, read -r -a urls <<< "$raw_urls"\n343\t    for url in "${urls[@]}"; do\n344\t        wait_for_server "" "${url%/}/models"\n345\t    done\n346\t}\n347\t\n348\t# Previous full-qrels output layout for filter-non-positive variants.\n349\t# variant_output_dir() {\n350\t#     case "$1" in\n351\t#         saturated | saturate) echo "$RUN_ROOT/tongyi_res_saturated" ;;\n352\t#         refer) echo "$RUN_ROOT/tongyi_res_refer" ;;\n353\t#         *) echo "Unknown variant: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;\n354\t#     esac\n355\t# }\n356\t#\n357\t# variant_cache_dir() {\n358\t#     case "$1" in\n359\t#         saturated | saturate) echo "$CACHE_ROOT/tongyi_res_saturated" ;;\n360\t#         refer) echo "$CACHE_ROOT/tongyi_res_refer" ;;\n361\t#         *) echo "Unknown variant: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;\n362\t#     esac\n363\t# }\n364\t\n365\tstart_tongyi_server() {\n366\t    if [[ "$START_SERVER" != "1" ]]; then\n367\t        wait_for_planning_endpoints\n368\t        wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${EMBEDDING_PORT}/health"\n369\t        return\n370\t    fi\n371\t\n372\t    EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="--no-async-scheduling${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:+ $EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS}" \\\n373\t    MODEL="$MODEL" \\\n374\t    FIRST_PORT="$PORT" \\\n375\t    TONGYI_REPLICAS="$TONGYI_REPLICAS" \\\n376\t    EMBEDDING_PORT="$EMBEDDING_PORT" \\\n377\t    TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \\\n378\t    MAX_MODEL_LEN="$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \\\n379\t    MAX_NUM_SEQS="$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \\\n380\t    NEURON_SCHEDULER="$NEURON_SCHEDULER" \\\n381\t    NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" \\\n382\t    LOG_DIR="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR" \\\n383\t    PLANNING_RESTART_DIR="$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR" \\\n384\t        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash" &\n385\t    TONGYI_PID=$!\n386\t\n387\t    for ((replica = 0; replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; replica++)); do\n388\t        wait_for_server \\\n389\t            "$TONGYI_PID" \\\n390\t            "http://127.0.0.1:$((PORT + replica))/v1/models"\n391\t    done\n392\t    wait_for_server "$TONGYI_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${EMBEDDING_PORT}/health"\n393\t\n394\t    if [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" ]]; then\n395\t        local sidecar_log_dir="${TP8_SIDECAR_LOG_DIR:-$PLANNING_LOG_DIR}"\n396\t        local sidecar_log="$sidecar_log_dir/tongyi-${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}.log"\n397\t        mkdir -p "$sidecar_log_dir"\n398\t        echo "Starting TP8 single-sequence sidecar: port=$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT cores=$TP8_SIDECAR_CORES log=$sidecar_log"\n399\t        numactl --cpunodebind=1 --membind=1 \\\n400\t            env \\\n401\t            MODEL="$MODEL" \\\n402\t            PORT="$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT" \\\n403\t            TP_SIZE=8 \\\n404\t            MAX_MODEL_LEN=128000 \\\n405\t            MAX_NUM_SEQS=1 \\\n406\t            NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=4000 \\\n407\t            NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$TP8_SIDECAR_CORES" \\\n408\t            NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" \\\n409\t            NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 \\\n410\t            NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom \\\n411\t            ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL=0 \\\n412\t            OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG="" \\\n413\t            NEURON_CACHE_TAG=tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1 \\\n414\t            EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="${TP8_SIDECAR_EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \\\n415\t            bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_tp8_s1.bash" \\\n416\t            >"$sidecar_log" 2>&1 &\n417\t        TP8_SIDECAR_PID=$!\n418\t        wait_for_server "$TP8_SIDECAR_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}/v1/models"\n419\t    fi\n420\t\n421\t    if [[ "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then\n422\t        local sidecar_ports=("$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2")\n423\t        local sidecar_cores=("48-51" "52-55")\n424\t        local index sidecar_port sidecar_cores_for_port sidecar_log\n425\t\n426\t        mkdir -p "$PLANNING_LOG_DIR"\n427\t        for index in "${!sidecar_ports[@]}"; do\n428\t            sidecar_port="${sidecar_ports[$index]}"\n429\t            sidecar_cores_for_port="${sidecar_cores[$index]}"\n430\t            sidecar_log="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR/tongyi-${sidecar_port}.log"\n431\t            echo "Starting experimental TP4 single-sequence sidecar: port=$sidecar_port cores=$sidecar_cores_for_port log=$sidecar_log"\n432\t            numactl --cpunodebind=1 --membind=1 \\\n433\t                env \\\n434\t                MODEL="$MODEL" \\\n435\t                PORT="$sidecar_port" \\\n436\t                TP_SIZE=4 \\\n437\t                MAX_MODEL_LEN=128000 \\\n438\t                MAX_NUM_SEQS=1 \\\n439\t                NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=4000 \\\n440\t                NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$sidecar_cores_for_port" \\\n441\t                NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" \\\n442\t                NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 \\\n443\t                NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom \\\n444\t                ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL=0 \\\n445\t                OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG=\'{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":128000,"max_context_length":128000,"context_encoding_buckets":[8192],"prefix_buckets":[122880],"token_generation_buckets":[16384,32768,65536,98304,128000],"save_sharded_checkpoint":true,"blockwise_matmul_config":{"use_shard_on_intermediate_dynamic_while":true}}\' \\\n446\t                NEURON_CACHE_TAG=tongyi-128k-prefix120-tp4-s1 \\\n447\t                EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="${TP4_SIDECAR_EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \\\n448\t                bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash" \\\n449\t                >"$sidecar_log" 2>&1 &\n450\t            TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS+=("$!")\n451\t            wait_for_server "${TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS[$index]}" "http://127.0.0.1:${sidecar_port}/v1/models"\n452\t        done\n453\t    fi\n454\t}\n455\t\n456\tstart_judge_server() {\n457\t    if [[ "$START_JUDGE_SERVER" != "1" ]]; then\n458\t Good reference for full real-world command-lines.\n68\t- **`docs/dev_doc/`**: internal experiment notes and analysis (context-limit studies, etc.), distinct from the user-facing `docs/*.md` run guides.\n69\t- **Generated / untracked artifacts** (treat as disposable unless a change explicitly needs them): `data/`, `indexes/`, `runs/`, `evals/`, `eval/`, `logs/`, `cache/`, `models/`, `virtual/` (and its symlinks `figures`, `similarity`, `doc_redundancy`).\n70\t\n71\t## Conventions\n72\t\n73\t- New retrievers: subclass `BaseSearcher`, register in the `SearcherType` enum, expose all config through `argparse` (no hard-coded constants).\n74\t- Keep the in-client `SearchToolHandler` and `searcher/tools.py` behaviorally identical when touching tool semantics.\n75\t- Never commit `.env`, API secrets, decrypted datasets, indexes, or run logs. cache/, evals/, logs/等，共约20GB）\n- 多个大型索引和模型文件（indexes/, local-models/，共约440GB）\n- 根目录杂项文件（=1.2.0, =1.4.0, PDFs等）\n\n根据CLAUDE.md第69行定义，以下目录被标记为"Generated / untracked artifacts (treat as disposable)"：\n`data/`, `indexes/`, `runs/`, `evals/`, `eval/`, `logs/`, `cache/`, `models/`, `virtual/`\n\n目标：\n1. 清理AWS Neuron编译器临时文件\n2. 删除废弃的虚拟环境（已迁移到Docker）\n3. 整理根目录杂项文件\n4. 为用户提供清晰的清理选项（实验数据、索引、模型等）\n\n## 推荐方案\n\n### Phase 1: 立即安全清理（无需确认，约36GB）\n\n清理以下内容不会影响任何功能，可立即执行：\n\n1. **70个16进制临时目录（~8.5GB）**\n   - 这些是AWS Neuron编译器的临时JSON文件，未被正确清理\n   - 格式：`0f4dbfdeee0d3838/`, `0f9a8599e9334abd/` 等\n   - 每个目录包含一个neuronxcc JSON文件\n   - 删除后不影响已编译的artifacts（在local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/中）\n\n2. **废弃的虚拟环境（~18.5GB）**\n   - `.venv-neuron/` (13GB) - 旧的Neuron Python环境，已被Docker替代\n   - `.venv-neuron-embedding/` (5.5GB) - 旧的Embedding环境，已被Docker替代\n   - `.venv/` (8.8GB) - 保留，用于非Docker开发\n\n3. **Python和测试缓存（~1MB）**\n   - `__pycache__/` 目录（11个）\n   - `.pytest_cache/`\n\n4. **根目录杂项文件（~50KB）**\n   - `=1.2.0`, `=1.4.0` - pip/uv安装残留\n   - 可选：`emnlp2022.tex` - LaTeX草稿（如不需要）\n\n5. **空日志文件（16个）**\n   - `logs/` 下的空.log文件\n\n**预计释放空间：约27GB**\n\n### Phase 2: 可选清理（需用户确认）\n\n根据用户需求决定是否清理：\n\n#### 选项A：清理实验数据（~20GB）\n\n如果不需要历史实验结果，可删除：\n- `runs/` 各子目录（qwen3-8b/, branching/, bm25/等，共13GB）\n- `cache/` 各子目录（qwen3-8b/, bm25/等，共5.8GB）\n- `evals/` 各子目录（共604MB）\n- `logs/` 历史日志（保留最近一周）\n- `virtual/` 分析结果（figures/, similarity/, doc_redundancy/，共1.5GB）\n\n**注意：** 这些文件可重新生成，但需要重新运行实验（耗时）\n\n#### 选项B：清理大型索引（~325GB）\n\n如果可以重新下载或不再需要：\n- `indexes/reason-moderncolbert/` (320GB) - ModernColBERT索引\n- `indexes/bm25/` (2.1GB) - 可通过`scripts_build_index/download_indexes.sh`重新下载\n- `indexes/qwen3-embedding-*/` (约3GB) - 可重新下载\n\n**保留建议：** 至少保留`indexes/qwen3-embedding-8b/`（当前baseline使用）\n\n#### 选项C：清理下载的模型（~114GB）\n\n如果可以从HuggingFace重新下载：\n- `local-models/Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B/` (114GB)\n- `models/Reason-ModernColBERT/` (573MB)\n\n**注意：** 删除后首次使用需重新下载（网络IO）\n\n#### 选项D：清理数据集（~2GB）\n\n如果可以从HuggingFace重新解密：\n- `data/browsecomp_plus_decrypted.jsonl` (2GB)\n- 可通过`scripts_build_index/decrypt_dataset.py`重新生成\n\n### Phase 3: 目录整理\n\n1. **移动文档到正确位置**\n   - `BrowseCompPlus_paper.pdf` → `docs/papers/`\n   - `Hawkeye__Visualizing_Investigation_Trajectories_in_Agentic_Search (1).pdf` → `docs/papers/`\n   - `emnlp2022.tex` → `docs/drafts/` 或删除\n\n2. **创建清理文档**\n   - 在项目根目录创建`CLEANUP.md`记录：\n     - 哪些目录可定期清理\n     - 如何重新生成各类artifacts\n     - 推荐的磁盘空间管理策略\n\n## 实施细节\n\n### Phase 1 清理脚本\n\n创建`scripts/cleanup_safe.bash`：\n\n```bash\n#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\nREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"\ncd "$REPO_ROOT"\n\necho "=== BrowseComp-Plus 安全清理 ==="\necho ""\n\n# 1. 删除16进制临时目录\necho "[1/5] 清理AWS Neuron编译器临时目录..."\nTEMP_DIRS=$(find . -maxdepth 1 -type d -name \'[0-9a-f][0-9a-f][0-9a-f][0-9a-f]*\' | wc -l)\nif [[ "$TEMP_DIRS" -gt 0 ]]; then\n    find . -maxdepth 1 -type d -name \'[0-9a-f][0-9a-f][0-9a-f][0-9a-f]*\' -exec rm -rf {} +\n    echo "  ✓ 删除了 $TEMP_DIRS 个临时目录"\nelse\n    echo "  ✓ 无临时目录需要清理"\nfi\n\n# 2. 删除废弃的虚拟环境\necho "[2/5] 清理废弃的虚拟环境..."\nREMOVED=0\nif [[ -d ".venv-neuron" ]]; then\n    rm -rf .venv-neuron\n    echo "  ✓ 删除 .venv-neuron/"\n    REMOVED=$((REMOVED + 1))\nfi\nif [[ -d ".venv-neuron-embedding" ]]; then\n    rm -rf .venv-neuron-embedding\n    echo "  ✓ 删除 .venv-neuron-embedding/"\n    REMOVED=$((REMOVED + 1))\nfi\nif [[ "$REMOVED" -eq 0 ]]; then\n    echo "  ✓ 无废弃环境需要清理"\nfi\n\n# 3. 删除Python缓存\necho "[3/5] 清理Python缓存..."\nPYCACHE_COUNT=$(find . -name \'__pycache__\' -type d | wc -l)\nif [[ "$PYCACHE_COUNT" -gt 0 ]]; then\n    find . -name \'__pycache__\' -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true\n    echo "  ✓ 删除了 $PYCACHE_COUNT 个 __pycache__ 目录"\nelse\n    echo "  ✓ 无Python缓存需要清理"\nfi\nif [[ -d ".pytest_cache" ]]; then\n    rm -rf .pytest_cache\n    echo "  ✓ 删除 .pytest_cache/"\nfi\n\n# 4. 删除根目录杂项文件\necho "[4/5] 清理根目录杂项文件..."\nREMOVED=0\nfor file in =1.2.0 =1.4.0; do\n    if [[ -f "$file" ]]; then\n        rm -f "$file"\n        echo "  ✓ 删除 $file"\n        REMOVED=$((REMOVED + 1))\n    fi\ndone\nif [[ "$REMOVED" -eq 0 ]]; then\n    echo "  ✓ 无杂项文件需要清理"\nfi\n\n# 5. 删除空日志文件\necho "[5/5] 清理空日志文件..."\nEMPTY_LOGS=$(find logs/ -type f -name \'*.log\' -size 0 2>/dev/null | wc -l)\nif [[ "$EMPTY_LOGS" -gt 0 ]]; then\n    find logs/ -type f -name \'*.log\' -size 0 -delete 2>/dev/null || true\n    echo "  ✓ 删除了 $EMPTY_LOGS 个空日志文件"\nelse\n    echo "  ✓ 无空日志文件需要清理"\nfi\n\necho ""\necho "=== 清理完成 ==="\necho "预计释放约 27GB 磁盘空间"\necho ""\necho "下一步（可选）："\necho "  - 运行 scripts/cleanup_experiments.bash 清理实验数据（约20GB）"\necho "  - 运行 scripts/cleanup_indexes.bash 清理大型索引（约325GB）"\necho "  - 查看 CLEANUP.md 了解更多清理选项"\n```\n\n### Phase 2 可选清理脚本\n\n创建`scripts/cleanup_experiments.bash`（交互式确认）：\n\n```bash\n#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\nREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"\ncd "$REPO_ROOT"\n\necho "=== BrowseComp-Plus 实验数据清理 ==="\necho ""\necho "警告：此操作将删除实验结果、缓存和日志"\necho "这些数据可以重新生成，但需要重新运行实验"\necho ""\nread -p "是否继续？[y/N] " -n 1 -r\necho\nif [[ ! $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then\n    echo "已取消"\n    exit 0\nfi\n\nTOTAL_SIZE=0\n\n# 清理runs/\nif [[ -d "runs" ]]; then\n    SIZE=$(du -sb runs/ 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)\n    TOTAL_SIZE=$((TOTAL_SIZE + SIZE))\n    echo "[1/5] 清理 runs/ ($(numfmt --to=iec-i --suffix=B $SIZE))..."\n    rm -rf runs/*\n    echo "  ✓ 已清理"\nfi\n\n# 清理cache/\nif [[ -d "cache" ]]; then\n    SIZE=$(du -sb cache/ 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)\n    TOTAL_SIZE=$((TOTAL_SIZE + SIZE))\n    echo "[2/5] 清理 cache/ ($(numfmt --to=iec-i --suffix=B $SIZE))..."\n    rm -rf cache/*\n    echo "  ✓ 已清理"\nfi\n\n# 清理evals/\nif [[ -d "evals" ]]; then\n    SIZE=$(du -sb evals/ 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)\n    TOTAL_SIZE=$((TOTAL_SIZE + SIZE))\n    echo "[3/5] 清理 evals/ ($(numfmt --to=iec-i --suffix=B $SIZE))..."\n    rm -rf evals/*\n    echo "  ✓ 已清理"\nfi\n\n# 清理logs/ (保留最近一周)\nif [[ -d "logs" ]]; then\n    echo "[4/5] 清理旧日志 (保留最近7天)..."\n    find logs/ -type f -mtime +7 -delete 2>/dev/null || true\n    echo "  ✓ 已清理"\nfi\n\n# 清理virtual/\nif [[ -d "virtual" ]]; then\n    SIZE=$(du -sb virtual/ 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)\n    TOTAL_SIZE=$((TOTAL_SIZE + SIZE))\n    echo "[5/5] 清理 virtual/ ($(numfmt --to=iec-i --suffix=B $SIZE))..."\n    rm -rf virtual/*\n    echo "  ✓ 已清理"\nfi\n\necho ""\necho "=== 清理完成 ==="\necho "释放了 $(numfmt --to=iec-i --suffix=B $TOTAL_SIZE) 磁盘空间"\n```\n\n创建`scripts/cleanup_indexes.bash`（交互式确认）：\n\n```bash\n#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\nREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"\ncd "$REPO_ROOT"\n\necho "=== BrowseComp-Plus 索引清理 ==="\necho ""\necho "可清理的索引："\necho ""\n\n# 列出索引大小\ndeclare -A INDEX_SIZES\nfor idx in indexes/*/; do\n    if [[ -d "$idx" ]]; then\n        name=$(basename "$idx")\n        size=$(du -sb "$idx" 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)\n        INDEX_SIZES["$name"]=$size\n        printf "  - %-30s %10s\\n" "$name" "$(numfmt --to=iec-i --suffix=B $size)"\n    fi\ndone\n\necho ""\necho "推荐操作："\necho "  1. 保留 qwen3-embedding-8b/ (当前baseline使用)"\necho "  2. 删除 reason-moderncolbert/ (320GB，如不再需要)"\necho "  3. 其他索引可通过 scripts_build_index/download_indexes.sh 重新下载"\necho ""\n\n# 交互式选择\nif [[ -d "indexes/reason-moderncolbert" ]]; then\n    read -p "删除 reason-moderncolbert/ (320GB)？[y/N] " -n 1 -r\n    echo\n    if [[ $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then\n        rm -rf indexes/reason-moderncolbert/\n        echo "  ✓ 已删除"\n    fi\nfi\n\necho ""\necho "提示：其他索引可根据需要手动删除，或运行："\necho "  rm -rf indexes/<index-name>/"\n```\n\n### Phase 3 创建CLEANUP.md\n\n创建项目根目录的`CLEANUP.md`：\n\n```markdown\n# BrowseComp-Plus 清理指南\n\n本文档说明项目中哪些目录和文件可以安全清理，以及如何重新生成。\n\n## 快速清理\n\n### 安全清理（推荐）\n\n删除临时文件、废弃环境、缓存，不影响功能：\n\n```bash\nbash scripts/cleanup_safe.bash\n```\n\n释放空间：约27GB\n\n### 实验数据清理（可选）\n\n删除实验结果、缓存、日志，可重新生成但耗时：\n\n```bash\nbash scripts/cleanup_experiments.bash\n```\n\n释放空间：约20GB\n\n### 索引清理（可选）\n\n删除大型索引文件，可重新下载：\n\n```bash\nbash scripts/cleanup_indexes.bash\n```\n\n释放空间：最多325GB\n\n## 目录说明\n\n### 可安全删除的目录（CLAUDE.md定义为disposable）\n\n| 目录 | 大小 | 重新生成方式 |\n|------|------|--------------|\n| `runs/` | ~13GB | 重新运行实验 |\n| `cache/` | ~6GB | 自动生成 |\n| `evals/` | ~600MB | 运行评估脚本 |\n| `logs/` | ~30MB | 运行时生成 |\n| `virtual/` | ~2GB | 运行分析脚本 |\n| `data/browsecomp_plus_decrypted.jsonl` | ~2GB | `scripts_build_index/decrypt_dataset.py` |\n| `indexes/` | ~325GB | `scripts_build_index/download_indexes.sh` |\n| `models/` | ~600MB | HuggingFace自动下载 |\n| `local-models/Alibaba-NLP/` | ~114GB | HuggingFace自动下载 |\n\n### 必须保留的目录（源代码和配置）\n\n- `search_agent/`, `searcher/`, `scripts/`, `tests/` - 源代码\n- `bash/`, `docker/` - 运行脚本\n- `docs/`, `topics-qrels/` - 文档和查询集\n- `CLAUDE.md`, `README.md`, `pyproject.toml` - 配置\n\n### 开发环境\n\n- `.venv/` - 保留（非Docker开发使用）\n- `.venv-neuron/`, `.venv-neuron-embedding/` - 已废弃（Docker替代）\n\n## 定期维护建议\n\n### 每周\n\n```bash\n# 清理旧日志（保留最近7天）\nfind logs/ -type f -mtime +7 -delete\n\n# 清理Python缓存\nfind . -name \'__pycache__\' -type d -exec rm -rf {} +\n```\n\n### 每月\n\n```bash\n# 清理不需要的实验结果\nbash scripts/cleanup_experiments.bash\n\n# 检查磁盘使用\ndu -sh runs/ cache/ evals/ indexes/ local-models/\n```\n\n### 按需\n\n```bash\n# 重新下载索引（如删除后需要）\nbash scripts_build_index/download_indexes.sh\n\n# 重新解密数据集（如删除后需要）\npython scripts_build_index/decrypt_dataset.py \\\n  --output data/browsecomp_plus_decrypted.jsonl \\\n  --generate-tsv topics-qrels/queries.tsv\n```\n\n## 磁盘空间估算\n\n| 配置 | 最小空间 | 推荐空间 |\n|------|----------|----------|\n| 仅源代码 | ~500MB | - |\n| + 基础索引（BM25 + Qwen3-8B） | ~4GB | ~5GB |\n| + 实验数据（runs/cache/evals） | +20GB | ~25GB |\n| + 全部索引 | +325GB | ~350GB |\n| + 模型文件 | +115GB | ~465GB |\n\n## 故障排查\n\n### 如果意外删除了重要文件\n\n1. **索引文件** - 运行 `bash scripts_build_index/download_indexes.sh`\n2. **数据集** - 运行 `python scripts_build_index/decrypt_dataset.py`\n3. **模型** - 首次使用时会自动从HuggingFace下载\n4. **编译产物** - 重新编译：`bash bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash`\n\n### 如果清理后运行失败\n\n检查以下必需文件是否存在：\n```bash\nls -lh indexes/qwen3-embedding-8b/\nls -lh topics-qrels/queries.tsv\nls -lh data/browsecomp_plus_decrypted.jsonl\n```\n\n如缺失，按上述方式重新生成。\n```\n\n## 验证方案\n\n### 验证Phase 1清理\n\n1. **运行清理脚本**\n   ```bash\n   bash scripts/cleanup_safe.bash\n   ```\n\n2. **验证文件已删除**\n   ```bash\n   # 应返回0\n   find /dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus -maxdepth 1 -type d -name \'[0-9a-f][0-9a-f][0-9a-f][0-9a-f]*\' | wc -l\n   \n   # 应不存在\n   ls /dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus/.venv-neuron* 2>&1\n   \n   # 应返回0或很少\n   find /dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus -name \'__pycache__\' | wc -l\n   ```\n\n3. **验证功能正常**\n   ```bash\n   # 在Docker容器中测试基本功能\n   cd /dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus\n   python3 -c "import searcher; import search_agent; print(\'✓ Imports OK\')"\n   \n   # 验证Neuron环境\n   neuron-ls\n   ```\n\n4. **检查磁盘空间释放**\n   ```bash\n   df -h /dev3\n   ```\n\n### 验证Phase 2清理（如执行）\n\n1. **验证实验数据清理**\n   ```bash\n   du -sh runs/ cache/ evals/ virtual/\n   # 各目录应为空或很小\n   ```\n\n2. **验证可重新生成**\n   ```bash\n   # 测试运行（1个查询）\n   cd /dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus\n   MAX_QUERIES=1 bash bash/neuron/run_tongyi_neuron.bash\n   \n   # 验证输出和缓存重新生成\n   ls -lh runs/qwen3-8b/\n   ls -lh cache/qwen3-8b/\n   ```\n\n### 验证Phase 3整理\n\n1. **验证文件移动**\n   ```bash\n   ls -lh docs/papers/\n   ls -lh CLEANUP.md\n   ```\n\n2. **验证文档可读性**\n   ```bash\n   cat CLEANUP.md | head -50\n   ```\n\n## 关键文件清单\n\n需要创建/修改的文件：\n\n1. `scripts/cleanup_safe.bash` - Phase 1自动清理脚本\n2. `scripts/cleanup_experiments.bash` - Phase 2实验数据清理（交互式）\n3. `scripts/cleanup_indexes.bash` - Phase 2索引清理（交互式）\n4. `CLEANUP.md` - 清理指南文档\n5. `docs/papers/` - 目录（如不存在则创建）\n\n## 风险评估\n\n### 低风险操作（Phase 1）\n- 删除临时hex目录 - ✓ 安全\n- 删除废弃虚拟环境 - ✓ 安全（已迁移到Docker）\n- 删除Python缓存 - ✓ 安全（可重新生成）\n- 删除根目录杂项 - ✓ 安全\n\n### 中风险操作（Phase 2选项A、D）\n- 删除runs/cache/evals - ⚠️ 可重新生成但耗时\n- 删除data/数据集 - ⚠️ 需重新解密（依赖HuggingFace access）\n\n### 高风险操作（Phase 2选项B、C）\n- 删除大型索引 - ⚠️ 重新下载耗时且占用带宽\n- 删除模型文件 - ⚠️ 重新下载耗时（114GB）\n\n**建议：** 先执行Phase 1，验证无问题后再根据需要执行Phase 2。\n'}}]

then\n    find . -maxdepth 1 -type d -name \'[0-9a-f][0-9a-f][0-9a-f][0-9a-f]*\' -exec rm -rf {} +\n    echo "  ✓ 删除了 $TEMP_DIRS 个临时目录"\nelse\n    echo "  ✓ 无临时目录需要清理"\nfi\n\n# 2. 删除废弃的虚拟环境\necho "[2/5] 清理废弃的虚拟环境..."\nREMOVED=0\nif [[ -d ".venv-neuron" ]]; then\n    rm -rf .venv-neuron\n    echo "  ✓ 删除 .venv-neuron/ (~13GB)"\n    REMOVED=$((REMOVED + 1))\nfi\nif [[ -d ".venv-neuron-embedding" ]]; then\n    rm -rf .venv-neuron-embedding\n    echo "  ✓ 删除 .venv-neuron-embedding/ (~5.5GB)"\n    REMOVED=$((REMOVED + 1))\nfi\nif [[ "$REMOVED" -eq 0 ]]; then\n    echo "  ✓ 无废弃环境需要清理"\nfi\n\n# 3. 删除Python缓存\necho "[3/5] 清理Python缓存..."\nPYCACHE_COUNT=$(find . -name \'__pycache__\' -type d 2>/dev/null | wc -l)\nif [[ "$PYCACHE_COUNT" -gt 0 ]]; then\n    find . -name \'__pycache__\' -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true\n    echo "  ✓ 删除了 $PYCACHE_COUNT 个 __pycache__ 目录"\nelse\n    echo "  ✓ 无Python缓存需要清理"\nfi\nif [[ -d ".pytest_cache" ]]; then\n    rm -rf .pytest_cache\n    echo "  ✓ 删除 .pytest_cache/"\nfi\n\n# 4. 删除根目录杂项文件\necho "[4/5] 清理根目录杂项文件..."\nREMOVED=0\nfor file in =1.2.0 =1.4.0; do\n    if [[ -f "$file" ]]; then\n        rm -f "$file"\n        echo "  ✓ 删除 $file"\n        REMOVED=$((REMOVED + 1))\n    fi\ndone\nif [[ "$REMOVED" -eq 0 ]]; then\n    echo "  ✓ 无杂项文件需要清理"\nfi\n\n# 5. 删除空日志文件\necho "[5/5] 清理空日志文件..."\nif [[ -d "logs" ]]; then\n    EMPTY_LOGS=$(find logs/ -type f -name \'*.log\' -size 0 2>/dev/null | wc -l)\n    if [[ "$EMPTY_LOGS" -gt 0 ]]; then\n        find logs/ -type f -name \'*.log\' -size 0 -delete 2>/dev/null || true\n        echo "  ✓ 删除了 $EMPTY_LOGS 个空日志文件"\n    else\n        echo "  ✓ 无空日志文件需要清理"\n    fi\nelse\n    echo "  ✓ logs/ 目录不存在"\nfi\n\necho ""\necho "=== 清理完成 ==="\necho "预计释放约 27GB 磁盘空间"\necho ""\necho "下一步（可选）："\necho "  - 运行 scripts/cleanup_experiments.bash 清理实验数据（约20GB）"\necho "  - 运行 scripts/cleanup_indexes.bash 清理大型索引（约325GB）"\necho "  - 查看 CLEANUP.md 了解更多清理选项"\n'}}]

[{'tool_use_id': 'toolu_bdrk_018M1zeWPKozwEAYGK6jREgy', 'type': 'tool_result', 'content': [{'type': 'text', 'text': 'Now I have enough information. Let me create a comprehensive analysis report.\n\n# vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0 Configuration Reference\n\n## 1. Setup Guide Key Findings\n\n### Installation Methods (0.21.0)\nvLLM-Neuron 0.21.0 offers three installation options:\n\n1. **From Source**: `pip install --extra-index-url=https://pip.repos.neuron.amazonaws.com -e .`\n2. **DLAMI**: Pre-built venv at `/opt/aws_neuronx_venv_pytorch_inference_vllm_0_21_0_1_0_0/bin/activate`\n3. **Docker Container**: vLLM Inference NeuronX DLC (recommended for production)\n\n### Key Environment Variables (0.21.0)\n```bash\n# Cache and compilation\nVLLM_CACHE_ROOT=/local/cache/vllm  # Default: ~/.cache/vllm\nNEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=/path/to/cache  # Pre-compiled artifacts\nVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=4  # Parallel compilation\n\n# Remote cache for multi-node\nVLLM_NEURON_REMOTE_CACHE=/path/to/nfs/cache\n\n# Compilation control\nVLLM_NEURON_CPU_COMPILE=1  # CPU-only compilation\nNEURON_PLATFORM_TARGET_OVERRIDE=trn2  # Target platform for CPU compile\nVLLM_NEURON_DISABLE_COMPILE_CACHE=0  # Force recompilation\nVLLM_NEURON_DISABLE_WARMUP_COMPILE=0  # Treat cache miss as fatal\n\n# Memory management\nVLLM_NEURON_KV_GMU_BUDGET_CAP_FRACTION=0.30  # KV cache fraction (default)\nVLLM_NEURON_MIN_KV_BUDGET_GIB=1.0  # Minimum KV budget\n\n# Logging\nVLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL=INFO\nHF_TOKEN=[REDACTED] 2. Reference Configuration Key Parameters\n\n### 2.1 Compilation Options (via `additional_config`)\n\n**0.21.0 uses `additional_config` with nested `neuron_config`:**\n\n```python\nadditional_config = {\n    "neuron_config": {\n        # Bucketing (replaces old OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG)\n        "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [128, 256, 512, 1024, 2048, 4096],\n        "num_seqs_buckets": [1, 2, 4, 8],\n        \n        # Segmented prefill (replaces chunked prefill)\n        "kv_segment_size_buckets": [2048],  # Must match num_batched_tokens_buckets\n        \n        # Optional decode context bucketing\n        "decode_context_length_buckets": [4096, 8192, 16384],\n        \n        # On-device sampling (REQUIRED for async scheduling)\n        "on_device_sampling_config": {\n            "all_greedy": True,\n            # OR\n            "temperature": "0.7"  # String, not float\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**CLI equivalent:**\n```bash\nvllm serve model \\\n    --additional-config \'{"neuron_config": {"num_seqs_buckets": [1, 2, 4]}}\'\n```\n\n### 2.2 Runtime Parameters (vLLM standard)\n\n**Prefix caching (enabled by default in 0.21.0):**\n```bash\n--enable-prefix-caching  # Default ON\n--no-enable-prefix-caching  # Disable\n--block-size 32\n--num-gpu-blocks-override 4096\n```\n\n**KV cache quantization:**\n```bash\n--kv-cache-dtype fp8  # ~50% memory reduction, requires calibrated scales\n```\n\n**Async scheduling (enabled by default):**\n```bash\n--no-async-scheduling  # Disable (requires on-device sampling to be enabled)\n```\n\n**Prompt embeddings:**\n```bash\n--enable-prompt-embeds  # Pass precomputed embeddings instead of token IDs\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3. Current Scripts Analysis\n\n### 3.1 Tongyi Compilation Script (`compile_tongyi.bash`)\n\n**Current Configuration:**\n```bash\n# Environment variables\nNXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS=16  # ⚠️ NEEDS REDUCTION to ≤8\nTP_SIZE=8\nMAX_MODEL_LEN=128000\nMAX_NUM_SEQS=2\n\n# Compilation memory limits (systemd cgroup)\nNEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH=1750G\nNEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX=1900G\n\n# Override Neuron config (OLD FORMAT)\nOVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG=\'{\n  "enable_bucketing": true,\n  "seq_len": 128000,\n  "max_context_length": 128000,\n  "context_encoding_buckets": [16384],\n  "prefix_buckets": [114688],\n  "token_generation_buckets": [16384,32768,65536,98304,128000],\n  "save_sharded_checkpoint": true,\n  "blockwise_matmul_config": {\n    "use_shard_on_intermediate_dynamic_while": true\n  }\n}\'\n```\n\n**Issues for 0.21.0:**\n1. ❌ Uses old `OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG` format (0.5.x/NxDI style)\n2. ❌ No `additional_config` with nested `neuron_config`\n3. ❌ No on-device sampling configuration\n4. ❌ `NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS=16` exceeds user requirement (≤8)\n5. ❌ Uses custom `context_encoding_buckets` + `prefix_buckets` (old APC terminology)\n6. ⚠️ No segmented prefill configuration\n\n**What needs changing:**\n- Migrate to 0.21.0 `additional_config` format\n- Replace `context_encoding_buckets`/`prefix_buckets`/`token_generation_buckets` with:\n  - `num_batched_tokens_buckets` (prefill)\n  - `num_seqs_buckets` (decode batch)\n  - `kv_segment_size_buckets` (segmented prefill)\n- Add on-device sampling config for async scheduling\n- Reduce `NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS` to ≤8\n\n---\n\n### 3.2 Judge Compilation Script (`compile_qwen3_32b_judge.bash`)\n\n**Current Configuration:**\n```bash\nTP_SIZE=4\nNXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS=2  # ✅ Already ≤8\nMAX_MODEL_LEN=8192\nMAX_NUM_SEQS=1\n\nOVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG=\'{\n  "enable_bucketing": true,\n  "seq_len": 8192,\n  "max_context_length": 8192,\n  "save_sharded_checkpoint": true\n}\'\n```\n\n**Issues:**\n1. ❌ Old `OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG` format\n2. ⚠️ No explicit bucket configuration (relies on defaults)\n3. ✅ `NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS=2` compliant\n\n---\n\n### 3.3 Embedding Compilation Script (`compile_qwen3_embedding.bash`)\n\n**Current Configuration:**\n```bash\n# Uses optimum-cli (NOT vLLM)\n"$VENV_DIR/bin/optimum-cli" export neuron \\\n    --model "$LOCAL_MODEL_DIR" \\\n    --task feature-extraction \\\n    --batch_size 2 \\\n    --sequence_length 1024 \\\n    --auto_cast matmul \\\n    --instance_type trn2 \\\n    --tensor_parallel_size 8\n```\n\n**Status:**\n- ✅ Uses separate embedding stack (Optimum Neuron)\n- ✅ No vLLM involvement, no changes needed for vLLM 0.21.0 migration\n\n---\n\n### 3.4 Tongyi Serve Script (`serve_tongyi.bash`)\n\n**Current Configuration:**\n```bash\nMAX_MODEL_LEN=128000\nMAX_NUM_SEQS=2\nBLOCK_SIZE=32\nENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING=1  # ✅ Default in 0.21.0\nNEURON_SCHEDULER=custom  # ⚠️ Deprecated concept in 0.21.0\n\n# Old override config\nOVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG=\'{\n  "enable_bucketing": true,\n  "seq_len": 128000,\n  "max_context_length": 128000,\n  "context_encoding_buckets": [16384],\n  "prefix_buckets": [114688],\n  "token_generation_buckets": [16384,32768,65536,98304,128000],\n  "save_sharded_checkpoint": true,\n  "blockwise_matmul_config": {...}\n}\'\n```\n\n**Issues:**\n1. ❌ `NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom` vs `native` - 0.21.0 uses unified scheduler\n2. ❌ Old config format passed via `serve_vllm_neuron.bash`\n3. ⚠️ No async scheduling flag (enabled by default in 0.21.0)\n4. ⚠️ No on-device sampling configuration\n\n---\n\n### 3.5 Common Runtime Script (`serve_vllm_neuron.bash`)\n\n**How it works:**\n```bash\n# Old style: Passes OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG as:\nargs+=(--additional-config "{\\"override_neuron_config\\":$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG}")\n```\n\n**0.21.0 requires:**\n```bash\n# New style: Nested neuron_config\nargs+=(--additional-config \'{"neuron_config": {...}}\')\n```\n\n**Key difference:**\n- **Old (0.5.x/NxDI)**: `--additional-config \'{"override_neuron_config": {...}}\'`\n- **New (0.21.0)**: `--additional-config \'{"neuron_config": {...}}\'`\n\n---\n\n### 3.6 Cluster Scripts\n\n**`serve_tongyi_cluster.bash`:**\n- ✅ NUMA-aware placement logic (good)\n- ✅ Multi-replica orchestration\n- ⚠️ Passes old config format to `serve_tongyi.bash`\n\n**`serve_qwen3_32b_judge_cluster.bash`:**\n- Similar architecture as Tongyi cluster\n- Needs same config format updates\n\n---\n\n## 4. Refactoring Checklist\n\n### 4.1 Compilation Parameter Mapping\n\n| Old (0.5.x/NxDI) | New (0.21.0) | Notes |\n|------------------|--------------|-------|\n| `OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG` | `additional_config.neuron_config` | JSON nesting change |\n| `context_encoding_buckets` | `num_batched_tokens_buckets` | Prefill token buckets |\n| `prefix_buckets` | (removed) | APC state managed automatically |\n| `token_generation_buckets` | Implicit from `max_model_len` | No longer explicit |\n| `seq_len` | (removed) | Use `--max-model-len` |\n| `max_context_length` | (removed) | Use `--max-model-len` |\n| `enable_bucketing` | (always true) | No flag needed |\n| `save_sharded_checkpoint` | (default behavior) | No flag needed |\n| `blockwise_matmul_config` | (removed) | Handled automatically |\n| `chunked_prefill_config` | `kv_segment_size_buckets` | Segmented prefill |\n\n### 4.2 Environment Variable Changes\n\n| Old | New | Notes |\n|-----|-----|-------|\n| `BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR` | (removed) | Not used in 0.21.0 |\n| `NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL` | `VLLM_CACHE_ROOT` or `NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS` | Renamed |\n| `NEURON_QUARANTINE_INCOMPLETE_ARTIFACTS` | (removed) | Built-in cache management |\n| `NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS` | `VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS` | Renamed |\n| `NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom/native` | (removed) | Single unified scheduler |\n| `DISABLE_NEURON_CUSTOM_SCHEDULER` | (removed) | No longer relevant |\n| `ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL` | (use segmented prefill) | Different mechanism |\n\n### 4.3 Critical Breaking Changes\n\n1. **Bucketing terminology:**\n   - Old: `context_encoding_buckets` + `prefix_buckets` (APC-specific)\n   - New: `num_batched_tokens_buckets` (unified prefill buckets)\n\n2. **Segmented prefill constraint:**\n   - `kv_segment_size_buckets` and `num_batched_tokens_buckets` **must match** (kernel constraint)\n   - Example: Both must be `[2048]` or both `[1024, 2048]`\n\n3. **On-device sampling required for async:**\n   - 0.21.0 enables async scheduling by default\n   - Requires `on_device_sampling_config` in `neuron_config`\n   - Only supports greedy (`all_greedy: true`) or temperature sampling\n\n4. **Scheduler unification:**\n   - No more `NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom` vs `native`\n   - Single scheduler with automatic prefill/decode batching\n\n---\n\n## 5. Recommended New Architecture\n\n### 5.1 Script Organization\n\n```\nbash/neuron/\n├── compile/\n│   ├── tongyi_30b.bash          # Tongyi compilation\n│   ├── qwen3_32b_judge.bash     # Judge compilation\n│   └── qwen3_embedding.bash     # Embedding (no changes)\n├── serve/\n│   ├── tongyi_single.bash       # Single instance\n│   ├── tongyi_cluster.bash      # Multi-replica\n│   ├── judge_single.bash\n│   ├── judge_cluster.bash\n│   └── embedding.bash           # Embedding service\n├── config/\n│   ├── tongyi_neuron_config.json    # Tongyi neuron_config\n│   ├── judge_neuron_config.json     # Judge neuron_config\n│   └── common_env.bash              # Shared env vars\n└── utils/\n    ├── vllm_launcher.bash       # Common vLLM startup logic\n    └── docker_wrapper.bash      # Docker exec wrapper\n```\n\n### 5.2 Example New Tongyi Compile Config\n\n**File: `config/tongyi_neuron_config.json`**\n```json\n{\n  "neuron_config": {\n    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [16384],\n    "num_seqs_buckets": [1, 2],\n    "kv_segment_size_buckets": [16384],\n    "on_device_sampling_config": {\n      "all_greedy": true\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n**File: `compile/tongyi_30b.bash`**\n```bash\n#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\nSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\nCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/../config"\n\n# Load common environment\nsource "$CONFIG_DIR/common_env.bash"\n\n# Model-specific settings\nMODEL="Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B"\nTP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"\nMAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-128000}"\nMAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-2}"\n\n# Compilation settings\nVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS="${VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS:-8}"  # ≤8\nNEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/tongyi-128k-tp8}"\n\n# Load neuron_config from JSON\nNEURON_CONFIG="$(cat "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi_neuron_config.json")"\n\n# Launch compilation via Docker\ndocker exec browsecomp-neuron-0.21.0 \\\n    env \\\n    VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS="$VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS" \\\n    NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" \\\n    NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="0-7" \\\n    python3 -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n    --model "$MODEL" \\\n    --tensor-parallel-size "$TP_SIZE" \\\n    --max-model-len "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \\\n    --max-num-seqs "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \\\n    --block-size 32 \\\n    --additional-config "$NEURON_CONFIG" \\\n    --port 8000\n```\n\n### 5.3 Key Improvements\n\n1. **Centralized configuration:**\n   - Neuron configs in JSON files (easier to version control)\n   - Common env vars in single file\n\n2. **Docker-first:**\n   - All scripts assume running in `browsecomp-neuron:0.21.0` container\n   - No Python venv detection logic needed\n\n3. **Simplified parameter passing:**\n   - Standard vLLM CLI flags\n   - No more custom `OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG` string building\n\n4. **Parallel compilation limit:**\n   - Default `VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=8`\n   - User can override: `VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=4 bash compile/tongyi_30b.bash`\n\n---\n\n## 6. Migration Path\n\n### Phase 1: Preparation\n1. ✅ Pull new Docker image: `docker pull <your-registry>/browsecomp-neuron:0.21.0`\n2. ✅ Backup current artifacts: `cp -r local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts{,.backup}`\n3. ✅ Create new config files in `bash/neuron/config/`\n\n### Phase 2: Tongyi Migration\n1. Create `tongyi_neuron_config.json` with 0.21.0 format\n2. Update `compile_tongyi.bash` to use new config\n3. Run compilation: `VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=8 bash compile/tongyi_30b.bash`\n4. Test serve script with new artifacts\n5. Benchmark: compare throughput/latency with old artifacts\n\n### Phase 3: Judge Migration\n1. Create `judge_neuron_config.json`\n2. Update judge compilation script\n3. Recompile judge artifacts\n4. Test judge cluster\n\n### Phase 4: Integration\n1. Update `n_tongyi.bash` to use new serve scripts\n2. Test full pipeline (embedding + planning + judge)\n3. Monitor for regressions\n\n---\n\n## 7. Docker Container Differences\n\n### Current (0.16.0):\n```yaml\nimage: public.ecr.aws/neuron/pytorch-inference-vllm-neuronx:0.16.0-neuronx-py312-sdk2.30.0-ubuntu24.04\n```\n\n### New (0.21.0):\n```yaml\nimage: <your-custom-registry>/browsecomp-neuron:0.21.0\n# Based on: AWS DLAMI with vLLM 0.21.0.1.0.0\n```\n\n**Key differences:**\n- vLLM version: 0.16.0 → 0.21.0\n- Plugin architecture: NxD Inference → native vLLM plugin\n- Python: 3.12 (same)\n- Neuron SDK: 2.30 → 2.31+\n\n---\n\n## 8. Complete Example Configurations\n\n### 8.1 Tongyi-30B (Planning Model)\n\n**Target: 128K context, TP=8, 2 concurrent sequences**\n\n```json\n{\n  "neuron_config": {\n    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [16384],\n    "num_seqs_buckets": [1, 2],\n    "kv_segment_size_buckets": [16384],\n    "decode_context_length_buckets": [16384, 32768, 65536, 98304, 128000],\n    "on_device_sampling_config": {\n      "all_greedy": true\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n**Compilation command:**\n```bash\nvllm serve Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B \\\n    --tensor-parallel-size 8 \\\n    --max-model-len 128000 \\\n    --max-num-seqs 2 \\\n    --block-size 32 \\\n    --num-gpu-blocks-override 8000 \\\n    --enable-prefix-caching \\\n    --additional-config \'{"neuron_config": {...}}\'\n```\n\n**Why these buckets:**\n- `num_batched_tokens_buckets: [16384]`: Process 16K tokens per prefill iteration\n- `num_seqs_buckets: [1, 2]`: Support 1-2 concurrent sequences (MAX_NUM_SEQS=2)\n- `kv_segment_size_buckets: [16384]`: Must match prefill buckets (kernel constraint)\n- `decode_context_length_buckets`: Optimize decode for different KV lengths (avoid compiling full 128K NEFF)\n\n---\n\n### 8.2 Qwen3-32B (Judge Model)\n\n**Target: 8K context, TP=4, single sequence**\n\n```json\n{\n  "neuron_config": {\n    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [512, 1024, 2048, 4096, 8192],\n    "num_seqs_buckets": [1],\n    "on_device_sampling_config": {\n      "all_greedy": true\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n**Compilation command:**\n```bash\nvllm serve Qwen/Qwen3-32B \\\n    --tensor-parallel-size 4 \\\n    --max-model-len 8192 \\\n    --max-num-seqs 1 \\\n    --block-size 128 \\\n    --additional-config \'{"neuron_config": {...}}\'\n```\n\n**Why these buckets:**\n- Multiple prefill buckets for judge queries (typically short)\n- Single sequence (judge processes one query at a time)\n- No segmented prefill needed (8K fits in single bucket)\n\n---\n\n## 9. Recompilation Triggers (Cache Invalidation)\n\nYour cache **will be invalidated** (forcing recompilation) when:\n\n1. ✅ **Neuron SDK version changes** (2.30 → 2.31)\n2. ✅ **vLLM-Neuron version changes** (0.16.0 → 0.21.0)\n3. ✅ **Bucket configuration changes** (different `num_batched_tokens_buckets`)\n4. ✅ **Model architecture changes** (different model code)\n5. ✅ **TP size changes** (8 → 16)\n6. ✅ **Hardware target changes** (trn2 → trn3)\n7. ⚠️ **Compiler flags change** (rarely modified)\n\n**Your cache remains valid when:**\n- Restarting server with same config\n- Changing port/host\n- Changing `max_num_seqs` (if buckets still cover it)\n- Python code changes (non-model)\n\n---\n\n## 10. Performance Tuning Checklist\n\n### 10.1 Memory Optimization\n```bash\n# Increase KV cache allocation (default 0.30 → 0.35)\nexport VLLM_NEURON_KV_GMU_BUDGET_CAP_FRACTION=0.35\n\n# Use FP8 KV cache (~50% memory reduction)\n--kv-cache-dtype fp8  # Requires calibrated checkpoint\n```\n\n### 10.2 Compilation Speed\n```bash\n# Use remote cache for multi-node\nexport VLLM_NEURON_REMOTE_CACHE=/mnt/efs/neuron-cache\n\n# Reduce parallel workers on memory-constrained nodes\nexport VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=4  # Instead of 8\n```\n\n### 10.3 Prefix Caching\n```bash\n# Allocate more blocks for prefix reuse\n--num-gpu-blocks-override 8000  # Instead of auto-calculated\n\n# Adjust block size (trade-off: larger = less overhead, smaller = less waste)\n--block-size 32  # Default, good balance\n--block-size 64  # Fewer blocks needed, but more padding waste\n```\n\n---\n\n## Appendix: Quick Reference Table\n\n### Old vs New Configuration Syntax\n\n| Aspect | Old (0.5.x/NxDI) | New (0.21.0) |\n|--------|------------------|--------------|\n| **Config passing** | `--additional-config \'{"override_neuron_config": {...}}\'` | `--additional-config \'{"neuron_config": {...}}\'` |\n| **Prefill buckets** | `"context_encoding_buckets": [16384]` | `"num_batched_tokens_buckets": [16384]` |\n| **Decode batches** | Implicit from `max_num_seqs` | `"num_seqs_buckets": [1, 2]` |\n| **APC prefix cache** | `"prefix_buckets": [114688]` | (removed, automatic) |\n| **Segmented prefill** | `ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL=1` | `"kv_segment_size_buckets": [16384]` |\n| **Async scheduling** | `NEURON_SCHEDULER=native` | Enabled by default, requires on-device sampling |\n| **Compile workers** | `NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS=16` | `VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=8` |\n| **Cache location** | `NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL` | `VLLM_CACHE_ROOT` or `NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS` |\n\n### Environment Variables Quick Ref\n\n```bash\n# Compilation (user requirement: ≤8 workers)\nexport VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=8\n\n# Cache paths\nexport NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=/path/to/artifacts\nexport VLLM_CACHE_ROOT=/local/nvme/cache\n\n# Runtime visibility\nexport NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES=0-7\n\n# Memory tuning\nexport VLLM_NEURON_KV_GMU_BUDGET_CAP_FRACTION=0.30\n```\n\n---\n\n**End of Report**\n\nThis comprehensive analysis covers:\n- ✅ vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0 official docs key findings\n- ✅ Current script configurations with issues highlighted\n- ✅ Detailed parameter mapping old → new\n- ✅ Recommended new architecture\n- ✅ Complete example configurations for all 3 models\n- ✅ Migration checklist and performance tuning tips'}]}]
