[{'type': 'tool_use', 'id': 'toolu_bdrk_01ANVvYD12dvABvBAXFkQyjD', 'name': 'Write', 'input': {'file_path': '/dev3/cc/plans/fluffy-tickling-pelican.md', 'content': '# bash/neuron/ 脚本重构计划 - vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0 迁移\n\n## Context\n\n当前 bash/neuron/ 脚本基于旧版 vLLM-Neuron (0.16.0 / NxDI) 编写，配置格式、参数名称和架构已过时。用户希望使用新的 Docker 环境 (browsecomp-neuron:0.21.0) 和 vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0 重构所有脚本，特别要求：\n\n1. **用户自主配置**：所有编译/运行参数由用户设定，特别是 neuron-vllm 特有参数\n2. **编译worker限制**：`≤8` 以避免挤爆单卡机器（trn2.3xlarge，1 device × 4 cores）\n3. **三个模型**：\n   - Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B（planning，128K context，TP=8）\n   - Qwen3-32B（judge，8K context，TP=4）\n   - Qwen3-Embedding-8B（embedding，使用 Optimum Neuron，不涉及 vLLM）\n\n**关键breaking changes（0.16.0 → 0.21.0）：**\n- 配置格式：`{"override_neuron_config": {...}}` → `{"neuron_config": {...}}`\n- Bucket术语：`context_encoding_buckets`/`prefix_buckets` → `num_batched_tokens_buckets`/`kv_segment_size_buckets`\n- 环境变量：`NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS` → `VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS`\n- Scheduler：移除 `NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom/native`，统一调度器\n- 必需配置：`on_device_sampling_config` (async scheduling 默认开启)\n\n## 推荐方案\n\n### 整体架构\n\n创建新的脚本结构，分离配置与逻辑：\n\n```\nbash/neuron/\n├── config/\n│   ├── tongyi.env                    # Tongyi 环境变量配置\n│   ├── tongyi_neuron_config.json     # Tongyi neuron_config (用户编辑)\n│   ├── judge.env                     # Judge 环境变量配置\n│   ├── judge_neuron_config.json      # Judge neuron_config\n│   ├── embedding.env                 # Embedding 配置\n│   └── README.md                     # 配置指南\n├── compile_tongyi.bash               # 新版 Tongyi 编译脚本\n├── compile_judge.bash                # 新版 Judge 编译脚本\n├── compile_embedding.bash            # Embedding 编译（保持不变或轻微调整）\n├── serve_tongyi.bash                 # 新版 Tongyi 单实例服务\n├── serve_tongyi_cluster.bash         # 新版 Tongyi 集群\n├── serve_judge.bash                  # 新版 Judge 单实例\n├── serve_judge_cluster.bash          # 新版 Judge 集群\n├── serve_embedding.bash              # Embedding 服务（保持不变或轻微调整）\n├── n_tongyi.bash                     # 更新一键运行脚本\n├── n_tongyi_get.bash                 # 更新一键运行脚本\n└── archive-pre-dlc/                  # 已有的归档目录\n```\n\n### 设计原则\n\n1. **配置与逻辑分离**：\n   - 所有模型特定参数在 `config/*.env` 和 `config/*_neuron_config.json`\n   - 脚本逻辑从配置文件读取，不硬编码参数\n   - 用户只需编辑 JSON 和 ENV 文件\n\n2. **Docker优先**：\n   - 所有脚本假定运行在 `browsecomp-neuron:0.21.0` 容器中\n   - 保留 Docker 自动检测逻辑（兼容宿主机直接调用）\n\n3. **向后兼容**：\n   - 旧脚本移至 `archive-pre-dlc/`（已完成）\n   - 新脚本保持相同的文件名和基本接口\n\n4. **参数可覆盖**：\n   - 配置文件提供默认值\n   - 环境变量可覆盖配置文件\n   - 命令行参数最高优先级\n\n## 实施细节\n\n### 1. 配置文件模板\n\n#### 1.1 `config/tongyi.env`\n\n```bash\n# Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B Configuration\n# vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0\n\n# Model settings\nMODEL="Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B"\nTP_SIZE=8\nMAX_MODEL_LEN=128000\nMAX_NUM_SEQS=2\n\n# Compilation settings\nVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=8  # ≤8 for trn2.3xlarge\nNEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="0-31"          # All 32 cores\nNEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH="1750G"\nNEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX="1900G"\n\n# Runtime settings\nBLOCK_SIZE=32\nNUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=8000\nENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING=1                 # Default ON in 0.21.0\n\n# Cache paths (relative to REPO_ROOT or absolute)\nNEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/tongyi-128k-tp8-v0.21.0}"\nVLLM_CACHE_ROOT="${VLLM_CACHE_ROOT:-local-models/vllm-cache}"\n\n# Logging\nVLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL=INFO\n```\n\n#### 1.2 `config/tongyi_neuron_config.json`\n\n```json\n{\n  "neuron_config": {\n    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [16384],\n    "num_seqs_buckets": [1, 2],\n    "kv_segment_size_buckets": [16384],\n    "decode_context_length_buckets": [16384, 32768, 65536, 98304, 128000],\n    "on_device_sampling_config": {\n      "all_greedy": true\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n**配置说明（写入 `config/README.md`）：**\n\n```markdown\n# Neuron Configuration Guide\n\n## Tongyi-30B Planning Model\n\n### `num_batched_tokens_buckets`\n- 控制每次prefill处理的token数量\n- 默认 `[16384]`：单次处理16K tokens\n- 更大值 = 更少prefill iterations，但初始延迟更高\n- 建议：保持16K（平衡首token延迟和吞吐）\n\n### `num_seqs_buckets`\n- 控制并发decode的序列数\n- 必须覆盖 `[1, MAX_NUM_SEQS]` 范围\n- 默认 `[1, 2]`：支持1或2个并发序列\n- 如果 `MAX_NUM_SEQS=4`，使用 `[1, 2, 4]`\n\n### `kv_segment_size_buckets`\n- 启用segmented prefill（分段预填充）\n- **必须与 `num_batched_tokens_buckets` 匹配**（kernel约束）\n- 默认 `[16384]`：与prefill buckets一致\n\n### `decode_context_length_buckets`\n- 优化不同KV cache长度的decode性能\n- 避免为每个长度编译完整NEFF\n- 默认覆盖16K-128K范围\n\n### `on_device_sampling_config`\n- **必需**（async scheduling默认开启）\n- `"all_greedy": true`：全部使用贪心采样\n- 或 `"temperature": "0.7"`（字符串，非浮点数）\n```\n\n#### 1.3 `config/judge.env`\n\n```bash\n# Qwen3-32B Judge Model Configuration\nMODEL="Qwen/Qwen3-32B"\nTP_SIZE=4\nMAX_MODEL_LEN=8192\nMAX_NUM_SEQS=1\n\n# Compilation (lower parallelism for judge)\nVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=2\nNEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="32-47"  # NUMA node 1, cores 32-47\n\n# Runtime\nBLOCK_SIZE=128\nNUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=2048\n\n# Cache\nNEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/judge-8k-tp4-v0.21.0}"\n```\n\n#### 1.4 `config/judge_neuron_config.json`\n\n```json\n{\n  "neuron_config": {\n    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [512, 1024, 2048, 4096, 8192],\n    "num_seqs_buckets": [1],\n    "on_device_sampling_config": {\n      "all_greedy": true\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n**Judge配置说明：**\n- 多个prefill buckets（512-8K）：judge查询通常较短，多bucket优化不同长度\n- 单序列：judge串行处理\n- 无segmented prefill：8K可单次处理\n\n#### 1.5 `config/embedding.env`\n\n```bash\n# Qwen3-Embedding-8B Configuration (Optimum Neuron)\nMODEL="Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B"\nTP_SIZE=8\nBATCH_SIZE=2\nSEQUENCE_LENGTH=1024\nINSTANCE_TYPE="trn2"\n\n# Cache\nEMBEDDING_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="${EMBEDDING_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/qwen3-embedding-8b}"\n```\n\n### 2. 编译脚本重构\n\n#### 2.1 `compile_tongyi.bash`（新版）\n\n```bash\n#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\nSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\nREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"\nCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/config"\n\n# Load configuration\nif [[ -f "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env" ]]; then\n    source "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env"\nelse\n    echo "Error: $CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env not found" >&2\n    exit 1\nfi\n\n# Detect environment\nif [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"\n    IN_DOCKER=1\nelse\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"\n    IN_DOCKER=0\nfi\n\n# Read neuron_config JSON\nNEURON_CONFIG_FILE="$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi_neuron_config.json"\nif [[ ! -f "$NEURON_CONFIG_FILE" ]]; then\n    echo "Error: $NEURON_CONFIG_FILE not found" >&2\n    exit 1\nfi\nADDITIONAL_CONFIG="$(cat "$NEURON_CONFIG_FILE")"\n\n# Resolve cache path\nif [[ "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" != /* ]]; then\n    NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$REPO_ROOT/$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\nfi\nmkdir -p "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n\necho "=== Tongyi-30B Compilation (vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0) ==="\necho "Model: $MODEL"\necho "TP Size: $TP_SIZE"\necho "Max Model Len: $MAX_MODEL_LEN"\necho "Max Num Seqs: $MAX_NUM_SEQS"\necho "Parallel Workers: $VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS"\necho "Artifacts: $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\necho "Neuron Config:"\necho "$ADDITIONAL_CONFIG" | jq .\necho ""\n\n# Compilation environment\nexport VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS\nexport NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS\nexport NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES\nexport VLLM_CACHE_ROOT\nexport VLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL\n\n# Optional: systemd cgroup memory limits (if running outside Docker)\nif [[ "$IN_DOCKER" -eq 0 ]] && command -v systemd-run &>/dev/null; then\n    SYSTEMD_WRAPPER="systemd-run --user --scope -p MemoryHigh=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH -p MemoryMax=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX"\nelse\n    SYSTEMD_WRAPPER=""\nfi\n\n# Run compilation\n$SYSTEMD_WRAPPER "$PYTHON_BIN" -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n    --model "$MODEL" \\\n    --tensor-parallel-size "$TP_SIZE" \\\n    --max-model-len "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \\\n    --max-num-seqs "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \\\n    --block-size "$BLOCK_SIZE" \\\n    --num-gpu-blocks-override "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" \\\n    --enable-prefix-caching \\\n    --additional-config "$ADDITIONAL_CONFIG" \\\n    --port 6008 \\\n    || {\n        echo ""\n        echo "Compilation failed. Check logs above."\n        echo "Common issues:"\n        echo "  - Insufficient memory: reduce VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS"\n        echo "  - Invalid neuron_config: check $NEURON_CONFIG_FILE"\n        echo "  - Bucket mismatch: kv_segment_size_buckets must match num_batched_tokens_buckets"\n        exit 1\n    }\n\necho ""\necho "=== Compilation Complete ==="\necho "Artifacts saved to: $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\necho "To serve: bash $SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash"\n```\n\n**关键改进：**\n1. 从 `config/tongyi.env` 加载所有配置\n2. 从 `config/tongyi_neuron_config.json` 读取 neuron_config（JSON格式，易于编辑）\n3. 自动检测 Docker 环境\n4. 显示完整配置供确认\n5. 友好的错误提示\n\n#### 2.2 `compile_judge.bash`（新版）\n\n类似结构，加载 `config/judge.env` 和 `config/judge_neuron_config.json`。\n\n#### 2.3 `compile_embedding.bash`（轻微调整）\n\n保持 Optimum Neuron 调用，仅更新：\n- 从 `config/embedding.env` 读取配置\n- 更新 cache 路径变量\n\n### 3. 服务脚本重构\n\n#### 3.1 `serve_tongyi.bash`（新版）\n\n```bash\n#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\nSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\nREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"\nCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/config"\n\n# Load configuration\nsource "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env"\n\n# Detect environment\nif [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"\nelse\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"\nfi\n\n# Read neuron_config\nADDITIONAL_CONFIG="$(cat "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi_neuron_config.json")"\n\n# Resolve paths\nif [[ "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" != /* ]]; then\n    NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$REPO_ROOT/$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\nfi\n\n# Check artifacts exist\nif [[ ! -f "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS/model.pt" ]]; then\n    echo "Error: No compiled artifacts at $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" >&2\n    echo "Run: bash $SCRIPT_DIR/compile_tongyi.bash" >&2\n    exit 1\nfi\n\n# Port configuration\nPORT="${PORT:-6008}"\n\necho "=== Tongyi-30B Server ==="\necho "Port: $PORT"\necho "Artifacts: $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\necho ""\n\n# Runtime environment\nexport NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS\nexport NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES\nexport VLLM_CACHE_ROOT\nexport VLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL\n\n# Serve\nexec "$PYTHON_BIN" -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n    --model "$MODEL" \\\n    --tensor-parallel-size "$TP_SIZE" \\\n    --max-model-len "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \\\n    --max-num-seqs "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \\\n    --block-size "$BLOCK_SIZE" \\\n    --num-gpu-blocks-override "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" \\\n    --enable-prefix-caching \\\n    --additional-config "$ADDITIONAL_CONFIG" \\\n    --port "$PORT" \\\n    --host 0.0.0.0\n```\n\n#### 3.2 `serve_tongyi_cluster.bash`（新版）\n\n保持 NUMA-aware 多副本架构，但：\n1. 从 `config/tongyi.env` 读取配置\n2. 每个副本调用新版 `serve_tongyi.bash`\n3. 传递不同的 `PORT` 和 `NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES`\n\n```bash\n#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\nSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\nCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/config"\n\n# Load base configuration\nsource "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env"\n\n# Cluster configuration\nFIRST_PORT="${FIRST_PORT:-6008}"\nTONGYI_REPLICAS="${TONGYI_REPLICAS:-7}"\nEMBEDDING_PORT="${EMBEDDING_PORT:-6030}"\n\necho "=== Tongyi-30B Cluster ==="\necho "Replicas: $TONGYI_REPLICAS"\necho "Port range: $FIRST_PORT-$((FIRST_PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS - 1))"\necho ""\n\n# Start embedding server\nPORT="$EMBEDDING_PORT" \\\n    bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_embedding.bash" &\nEMBEDDING_PID=$!\n\n# Start planning replicas\nfor ((replica = 0; replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; replica++)); do\n    port=$((FIRST_PORT + replica))\n    \n    # NUMA-aware core assignment (8 cores per replica, 2 replicas per node)\n    numa_node=$((replica / 2))\n    local_replica=$((replica % 2))\n    core_start=$((numa_node * 16 + local_replica * 8))\n    core_end=$((core_start + 7))\n    cores="${core_start}-${core_end}"\n    \n    echo "Starting replica $replica: port=$port cores=$cores numa=$numa_node"\n    \n    numactl --cpunodebind=$numa_node --membind=$numa_node \\\n        env \\\n        PORT="$port" \\\n        NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$cores" \\\n        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash" \\\n        > "logs/neuron-servers/tongyi-${port}.log" 2>&1 &\n    \n    PIDS+=($!)\ndone\n\n# Wait for readiness\nfor ((replica = 0; replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; replica++)); do\n    port=$((FIRST_PORT + replica))\n    until curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models" >/dev/null 2>&1; do\n        sleep 5\n    done\n    echo "Replica $replica ready (port $port)"\ndone\n\necho "All replicas ready"\nwait\n```\n\n### 4. 一键运行脚本更新\n\n#### 4.1 `n_tongyi.bash` 更新\n\n保持主逻辑不变，仅更新：\n1. 调用新版 `serve_tongyi_cluster.bash`\n2. 调用新版 `serve_judge_cluster.bash`\n3. 移除旧的 `OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG` 环境变量传递（现在从配置文件读取）\n\n**关键变更：**\n\n```bash\n# 旧版（删除）：\nOVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG=\'...\' \\\nNEURON_SCHEDULER=custom \\\nbash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash" &\n\n# 新版（简化）：\nbash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash" &\n```\n\n所有配置在 `config/*.env` 和 `config/*.json` 中，无需在启动脚本中传递。\n\n### 5. 配置文档\n\n创建 `bash/neuron/config/README.md`，详细说明：\n\n```markdown\n# Neuron 配置指南\n\n本目录包含三个模型的编译和运行时配置。\n\n## 文件结构\n\n- `tongyi.env` - Tongyi-30B planning模型环境变量\n- `tongyi_neuron_config.json` - Tongyi neuron_config（bucket配置）\n- `judge.env` - Qwen3-32B judge模型环境变量\n- `judge_neuron_config.json` - Judge neuron_config\n- `embedding.env` - Qwen3-Embedding-8B配置\n\n## 配置参数详解\n\n### 通用环境变量\n\n| 变量 | 说明 | 默认值 | 调整建议 |\n|------|------|--------|----------|\n| `VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS` | 并行编译worker数 | 8 | trn2.3xlarge最大8，减少可降低内存压力 |\n| `NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES` | 运行时可见的Neuron core | "0-31" | 多副本时按NUMA分配 |\n| `MAX_MODEL_LEN` | 模型最大上下文长度 | 128000 | 越大内存占用越高 |\n| `MAX_NUM_SEQS` | 最大并发序列数 | 2 | 增加可提高吞吐，但需更多内存 |\n| `BLOCK_SIZE` | KV cache block大小 | 32 | 32-128，越小浪费越少但管理开销越大 |\n\n### Neuron Config 参数\n\n#### `num_batched_tokens_buckets`\n每次prefill处理的token数量buckets。\n\n**示例：**\n- `[16384]` - 单bucket，128K context分8次prefill\n- `[8192, 16384]` - 双bucket，自动选择合适大小\n\n**权衡：**\n- 更大bucket → 更少iteration，首token延迟更高\n- 更小bucket → 更多iteration，吞吐可能降低\n\n#### `num_seqs_buckets`\n并发decode序列数buckets。\n\n**规则：**\n- 必须包含 `1` 和 `MAX_NUM_SEQS`\n- 建议覆盖 `[1, 2, ..., MAX_NUM_SEQS]`\n\n**示例：**\n- `MAX_NUM_SEQS=2` → `[1, 2]`\n- `MAX_NUM_SEQS=4` → `[1, 2, 4]`（节省编译时间）\n\n#### `kv_segment_size_buckets`\nSegmented prefill的segment大小。\n\n**重要约束：**\n- **必须与 `num_batched_tokens_buckets` 完全匹配**\n- 例如：prefill=[16384] → segment=[16384]\n\n#### `decode_context_length_buckets`（可选）\n优化不同KV长度的decode性能。\n\n**示例：**\n```json\n"decode_context_length_buckets": [16384, 32768, 65536, 98304, 128000]\n```\n\n避免为每个长度编译完整NEFF，节省编译时间。\n\n#### `on_device_sampling_config`\n**必需配置**（async scheduling默认开启）。\n\n**选项：**\n1. 全贪心：`{"all_greedy": true}`\n2. Temperature采样：`{"temperature": "0.7"}`（注意：字符串类型）\n\n## 快速调整场景\n\n### 降低内存占用\n```bash\n# tongyi.env\nVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=4  # 减少并行度\nMAX_NUM_SEQS=1                         # 减少并发\nNUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=6000           # 减少KV cache blocks\n```\n\n### 提高吞吐量\n```bash\n# tongyi.env\nMAX_NUM_SEQS=4                         # 增加并发\n```\n\n```json\n// tongyi_neuron_config.json\n"num_seqs_buckets": [1, 2, 4]\n```\n\n### 降低首token延迟\n```json\n// tongyi_neuron_config.json\n"num_batched_tokens_buckets": [8192]   // 更小bucket\n```\n\n### 编译失败排查\n\n**现象1：OOM during compilation**\n```bash\n# 解决：减少并行度\nVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=2\n```\n\n**现象2：Bucket mismatch error**\n```\nkv_segment_size_buckets must match num_batched_tokens_buckets\n```\n```json\n// 解决：确保两者一致\n"num_batched_tokens_buckets": [16384],\n"kv_segment_size_buckets": [16384]\n```\n\n**现象3：On-device sampling required**\n```\nAsyncScheduler requires on_device_sampling_config\n```\n```json\n// 解决：添加on-device sampling配置\n"on_device_sampling_config": {\n  "all_greedy": true\n}\n```\n\n## 参考资料\n\n- [vLLM-Neuron Setup Guide](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-neuron/blob/release-0.21.0.1.0.0/docs/getting-started/setup-guide.md)\n- [Reference Configuration](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-neuron/blob/release-0.21.0.1.0.0/docs/guides/reference-configuration.md)\n```\n\n## 验证方案\n\n### 阶段1：配置文件创建\n\n1. 创建 `bash/neuron/config/` 目录\n2. 写入5个配置文件（3个 .env + 2个 .json）\n3. 写入配置文档 `config/README.md`\n\n**验证命令：**\n```bash\nls -lh bash/neuron/config/\njq . bash/neuron/config/tongyi_neuron_config.json  # 验证JSON有效\nsource bash/neuron/config/tongyi.env && echo $MODEL  # 验证ENV有效\n```\n\n### 阶段2：Tongyi编译脚本测试\n\n1. 创建新版 `compile_tongyi.bash`\n2. 在Docker容器中编译Tongyi（≤8 workers）\n\n**验证命令：**\n```bash\n# 在容器内\ncd /dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus\nbash bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash\n\n# 验证artifacts\nls -lh local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/tongyi-128k-tp8-v0.21.0/\n# 应包含 model.pt 和其他 .pt 文件\n```\n\n**预期时间：** 30-60分钟（首次编译）\n\n### 阶段3：Tongyi服务脚本测试\n\n1. 创建新版 `serve_tongyi.bash`\n2. 启动单实例测试\n\n**验证命令：**\n```bash\n# 在容器内\nPORT=6008 bash bash/neuron/serve_tongyi.bash &\n\n# 等待启动\nuntil curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:6008/v1/models; do sleep 5; done\n\n# 测试推理\ncurl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:6008/v1/completions \\\n  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\\n  -d \'{\n    "model": "Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B",\n    "prompt": "Hello, who are you?",\n    "max_tokens": 50\n  }\'\n\n# 验证prefix caching\ncurl http://127.0.0.1:6008/metrics | grep vllm_cache_prefix\n```\n\n### 阶段4：Judge脚本迁移\n\n类似阶段2-3，针对Judge模型。\n\n**验证命令：**\n```bash\nbash bash/neuron/compile_judge.bash\nPORT=8032 bash bash/neuron/serve_judge.bash &\ncurl http://127.0.0.1:8032/v1/models\n```\n\n### 阶段5：集群脚本测试\n\n1. 更新 `serve_tongyi_cluster.bash`\n2. 启动多副本\n\n**验证命令：**\n```bash\nbash bash/neuron/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash &\n\n# 验证所有副本\nfor port in {6008..6014}; do\n  curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/models || echo "Port $port failed"\ndone\n\n# 测试负载均衡（通过planning_ports参数）\n```\n\n### 阶段6：一键脚本更新\n\n1. 更新 `n_tongyi.bash` 和 `n_tongyi_get.bash`\n2. 运行完整pipeline测试\n\n**验证命令：**\n```bash\n# 运行单个查询测试\nMAX_QUERIES=1 START_SERVER=1 RUN_EVAL=1 bash bash/neuron/n_tongyi.bash\n\n# 验证输出\nls runs/qwen3-8b/8qrel/tongyi_filter_all_no_get/\n# 应包含1个查询的JSON结果\n\n# 验证评估\nls runs/qwen3-8b/8qrel/tongyi_filter_all_no_get/\n# 应包含 evaluation_summary.json\n```\n\n### 性能对比（可选）\n\n对比新旧artifacts的性能：\n\n```bash\n# 测试吞吐量\npython tests/test_neuron_throughput.py --port 6008\n\n# 测试首token延迟\npython tests/test_neuron_latency.py --port 6008\n```\n\n## 关键文件清单\n\n需要创建/修改的文件：\n\n### 新建配置文件（6个）\n1. `bash/neuron/config/tongyi.env`\n2. `bash/neuron/config/tongyi_neuron_config.json`\n3. `bash/neuron/config/judge.env`\n4. `bash/neuron/config/judge_neuron_config.json`\n5. `bash/neuron/config/embedding.env`\n6. `bash/neuron/config/README.md`\n\n### 重构脚本（8个）\n7. `bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash` - 完全重写\n8. `bash/neuron/compile_judge.bash` - 完全重写\n9. `bash/neuron/compile_embedding.bash` - 轻微调整（可选）\n10. `bash/neuron/serve_tongyi.bash` - 完全重写\n11. `bash/neuron/serve_judge.bash` - 完全重写\n12. `bash/neuron/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash` - 重构\n13. `bash/neuron/serve_judge_cluster.bash` - 重构\n14. `bash/neuron/serve_embedding.bash` - 轻微调整（可选）\n\n### 更新脚本（2个）\n15. `bash/neuron/n_tongyi.bash` - 移除旧环境变量传递\n16. `bash/neuron/n_tongyi_get.bash` - 同上\n\n## 风险评估\n\n### 低风险\n- ✅ 配置文件创建（不影响现有代码）\n- ✅ 新artifacts与旧artifacts并存（不同目录）\n- ✅ 旧脚本已归档在 `archive-pre-dlc/`\n\n### 中风险\n- ⚠️ 首次编译耗时长（30-60分钟/模型）\n- ⚠️ 新配置可能需要多次调优（bucket size等）\n- ⚠️ 内存占用可能与预期不同（需监控）\n\n### 高风险（可控）\n- ⚠️ 新artifacts性能可能与旧版不同（需性能测试）\n- ⚠️ 如删除旧artifacts，无法快速回滚\n\n**风险缓解：**\n1. 保留旧artifacts至少2周\n2. 新artifacts使用不同目录名（包含 `v0.21.0` 后缀）\n3. 性能下降>10%时，保留旧脚本选项\n\n## 实施顺序\n\n### 第1步：准备工作（10分钟）\n- 创建 `bash/neuron/config/` 目录\n- 写入所有配置文件和文档\n\n### 第2步：Tongyi迁移（1-2小时）\n- 创建编译脚本 → 编译 → 测试服务脚本 → 测试集群脚本\n\n### 第3步：Judge迁移（30-60分钟）\n- 创建编译脚本 → 编译 → 测试服务脚本 → 测试集群脚本\n\n### 第4步：Embedding调整（可选，10分钟）\n- 如果需要，更新 embedding 脚本从 `config/embedding.env` 读取配置\n\n### 第5步：集成测试（30分钟）\n- 更新 `n_tongyi.bash` → **编译worker限制**：`≤8` 以避免挤爆单卡机器（trn2.3xlarge，1 device × 4 cores）\n9\t3. **三个模型**：\n10\t   - Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B（planning，128K context，TP=8）\n11\t   - Qwen3-32B（judge，8K context，TP=4）\n12\t   - Qwen3-Embedding-8B（embedding，使用 Optimum Neuron，不涉及 vLLM）\n13\t\n14\t**关键breaking changes（0.16.0 → 0.21.0）：**\n15\t- 配置格式：`{"override_neuron_config": {...}}` → `{"neuron_config": {...}}`\n16\t- Bucket术语：`context_encoding_buckets`/`prefix_buckets` → `num_batched_tokens_buckets`/`kv_segment_size_buckets`\n17\t- 环境变量：`NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS` → `VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS`\n18\t- Scheduler：移除 `NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom/native`，统一调度器\n19\t- 必需配置：`on_device_sampling_config` (async scheduling 默认开启)\n20\t\n21\t## 推荐方案\n22\t\n23\t### 整体架构\n24\t\n25\t创建新的脚本结构，分离配置与逻辑：\n26\t\n27\t```\n28\tbash/neuron/\n29\t├── config/\n30\t│   ├── tongyi.env                    # Tongyi 环境变量配置\n31\t│   ├── tongyi_neuron_config.json     # Tongyi neuron_config (用户编辑)\n32\t│   ├── judge.env                     # Judge 环境变量配置\n33\t│   ├── judge_neuron_config.json      # Judge neuron_config\n34\t│   ├── embedding.env                 # Embedding 配置\n35\t│   └── README.md                     # 配置指南\n36\t├── compile_tongyi.bash               # 新版 Tongyi 编译脚本\n37\t├── compile_judge.bash                # 新版 Judge 编译脚本\n38\t├── compile_embedding.bash            # Embedding 编译（保持不变或轻微调整）\n39\t├── serve_tongyi.bash                 # 新版 Tongyi 单实例服务\n40\t├── serve_tongyi_cluster.bash         # 新版 Tongyi 集群\n41\t├── serve_judge.bash                  # 新版 Judge 单实例\n42\t├── serve_judge_cluster.bash          # 新版 Judge 集群\n43\t├── serve_embedding.bash              # Embedding 服务（保持不变或轻微调整）\n44\t├── n_tongyi.bash                     # 更新一键运行脚本\n45\t├── n_tongyi_get.bash                 # 更新一键运行脚本\n46\t└── archive-pre-dlc/                  # 已有的归档目录\n47\t```\n48\t\n49\t### 设计原则\n50\t\n51\t1. **配置与逻辑分离**：\n52\t   - 所有模型特定参数在 `config/*.env` 和 `config/*_neuron_config.json`\n53\t   - 脚本逻辑从配置文件读取，不硬编码参数\n54\t   - 用户只需编辑 JSON 和 ENV 文件\n55\t\n56\t2. **Docker优先**：\n57\t   - 所有脚本假定运行在 `browsecomp-neuron:0.21.0` 容器中\n58\t   - 保留 Docker 自动检测逻辑（兼容宿主机直接调用）\n59\t\n60\t3. **向后兼容**：\n61\t   - 旧脚本移至 `archive-pre-dlc/`（已完成）\n62\t   - 新脚本保持相同的文件名和基本接口\n63\t\n64\t4. **参数可覆盖**：\n65\t   - 配置文件提供默认值\n66\t   - 环境变量可覆盖配置文件\n67\t   - 命令行参数最高优先级\n68\t\n69\t## 实施细节\n70\t\n71\t### 1. 配置文件模板\n72\t\n73\t#### 1.1 `config/tongyi.env`\n74\t\n75\t```bash\n76\t# Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B Configuration\n77\t# vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0\n78\t\n79\t# Model settings\n80\tMODEL="Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B"\n81\tTP_SIZE=8\n82\tMAX_MODEL_LEN=128000\n83\tMAX_NUM_SEQS=2\n84\t\n85\t# Compilation settings\n86\tVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=8  # ≤8 for trn2.3xlarge\n87\tNEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="0-31"          # All 32 cores\n88\tNEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH="1750G"\n89\tNEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX="1900G"\n90\t\n91\t# Runtime settings\n92\tBLOCK_SIZE=32\n93\tNUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=8000\n94\tENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING=1                 # Default ON in 0.21.0\n95\t\n96\t# Cache paths (relative to REPO_ROOT or absolute)\n97\tNEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/tongyi-128k-tp8-v0.21.0}"\n98\tVLLM_CACHE_ROOT="${VLLM_CACHE_ROOT:-local-models/vllm-cache}"\n99\t\n100\t# Logging\n101\tVLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL=INFO\n102\t```\n103\t\n104\t#### 1.2 `config/tongyi_neuron_config.json`\n105\t\n106\t```json\n107\t{\n108\t  "neuron_config": {\n109\t    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [16384],\n110\t    "num_seqs_buckets": [1, 2],\n111\t    "kv_segment_size_buckets": [16384],\n112\t    "decode_context_length_buckets": [16384, 32768, 65536, 98304, 128000],\n113\t    "on_device_sampling_config": {\n114\t      "all_greedy": true\n115\t    }\n116\t  }\n117\t}\n118\t```\n119\t\n120\t**配置说明（写入 `config/README.md`）：**\n121\t\n122\t```markdown\n123\t# Neuron Configuration Guide\n124\t\n125\t## Tongyi-30B Planning Model\n126\t\n127\t### `num_batched_tokens_buckets`\n128\t- 控制每次prefill处理的token数量\n129\t- 默认 `[16384]`：单次处理16K tokens\n130\t- 更大值 = 更少prefill iterations，但初始延迟更高\n131\t- 建议：保持16K（平衡首token延迟和吞吐）\n132\t\n133\t### `num_seqs_buckets`\n134\t- 控制并发decode的序列数\n135\t- 必须覆盖 `[1, MAX_NUM_SEQS]` 范围\n136\t- 默认 `[1, 2]`：支持1或2个并发序列\n137\t- 如果 `MAX_NUM_SEQS=4`，使用 `[1, 2, 4]`\n138\t\n139\t### `kv_segment_size_buckets`\n140\t- 启用segmented prefill（分段预填充）\n141\t- **必须与 `num_batched_tokens_buckets` 匹配**（kernel约束）\n142\t- 默认 `[16384]`：与prefill buckets一致\n143\t\n144\t### `decode_context_length_buckets`\n145\t- 优化不同KV cache长度的decode性能\n146\t- 避免为每个长度编译完整NEFF\n147\t- 默认覆盖16K-128K范围\n148\t\n149\t### `on_device_sampling_config`\n150\t- **必需**（async scheduling默认开启）\n151\t- `"all_greedy": true`：全部使用贪心采样\n152\t- 或 `"temperature": "0.7"`（字符串，非浮点数）\n153\t```\n154\t\n155\t#### 1.3 `config/judge.env`\n156\t\n157\t```bash\n158\t# Qwen3-32B Judge Model Configuration\n159\tMODEL="Qwen/Qwen3-32B"\n160\tTP_SIZE=4\n161\tMAX_MODEL_LEN=8192\n162\tMAX_NUM_SEQS=1\n163\t\n164\t# Compilation (lower parallelism for judge)\n165\tVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=2\n166\tNEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="32-47"  # NUMA node 1, cores 32-47\n167\t\n168\t# Runtime\n169\tBLOCK_SIZE=128\n170\tNUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=2048\n171\t\n172\t# Cache\n173\tNEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/judge-8k-tp4-v0.21.0}"\n174\t```\n175\t\n176\t#### 1.4 `config/judge_neuron_config.json`\n177\t\n178\t```json\n179\t{\n180\t  "neuron_config": {\n181\t    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [512, 1024, 2048, 4096, 8192],\n182\t    "num_seqs_buckets": [1],\n183\t    "on_device_sampling_config": {\n184\t      "all_greedy": true\n185\t    }\n186\t  }\n187\t}\n188\t```\n189\t\n190\t**Judge配置说明：**\n191\t- 多个prefill buckets（512-8K）：judge查询通常较短，多bucket优化不同长度\n192\t- 单序列：judge串行处理\n193\t- 无segmented prefill：8K可单次处理\n194\t\n195\t#### 1.5 `config/embedding.env`\n196\t\n197\t```bash\n198\t# Qwen3-Embedding-8B Configuration (Optimum Neuron)\n199\tMODEL="Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B"\n200\tTP_SIZE=8\n201\tBATCH_SIZE=2\n202\tSEQUENCE_LENGTH=1024\n203\tINSTANCE_TYPE="trn2"\n204\t\n205\t# Cache\n206\tEMBEDDING_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="${EMBEDDING_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/qwen3-embedding-8b}"\n207\t```\n208\t\n209\t### 2. 编译脚本重构\n210\t\n211\t#### 2.1 `compile_tongyi.bash`（新版）\n212\t\n213\t```bash\n214\t#!/usr/bin/env bash\n215\tset -euo pipefail\n216\t\n217\tSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\n218\tREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"\n219\tCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/config"\n220\t\n221\t# Load configuration\n222\tif [[ -f "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env" ]]; then\n223\t    source "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env"\n224\telse\n225\t    echo "Error: $CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env not found" >&2\n226\t    exit 1\n227\tfi\n228\t\n229\t# Detect environment\n230\tif [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then\n231\t    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"\n232\t    IN_DOCKER=1\n233\telse\n234\t    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"\n235\t    IN_DOCKER=0\n236\tfi\n237\t\n238\t# Read neuron_config JSON\n239\tNEURON_CONFIG_FILE="$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi_neuron_config.json"\n240\tif [[ ! -f "$NEURON_CONFIG_FILE" ]]; then\n241\t    echo "Error: $NEURON_CONFIG_FILE not found" >&2\n242\t    exit 1\n243\tfi\n244\tADDITIONAL_CONFIG="$(cat "$NEURON_CONFIG_FILE")"\n245\t\n246\t# Resolve cache path\n247\tif [[ "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" != /* ]]; then\n248\t    NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$REPO_ROOT/$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n249\tfi\n250\tmkdir -p "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n251\t\n252\techo "=== Tongyi-30B Compilation (vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0) ==="\n253\techo "Model: $MODEL"\n254\techo "TP Size: $TP_SIZE"\n255\techo "Max Model Len: $MAX_MODEL_LEN"\n256\techo "Max Num Seqs: $MAX_NUM_SEQS"\n257\techo "Parallel Workers: $VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS"\n258\techo "Artifacts: $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n259\techo "Neuron Config:"\n260\techo "$ADDITIONAL_CONFIG" | jq .\n261\techo ""\n262\t\n263\t# Compilation environment\n264\texport VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS\n265\texport NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS\n266\texport NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES\n267\texport VLLM_CACHE_ROOT\n268\texport VLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL\n269\t\n270\t# Optional: systemd cgroup memory limits (if running outside Docker)\n271\tif [[ "$IN_DOCKER" -eq 0 ]] && command -v systemd-run &>/dev/null; then\n272\t    SYSTEMD_WRAPPER="systemd-run --user --scope -p MemoryHigh=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH -p MemoryMax=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX"\n273\telse\n274\t    SYSTEMD_WRAPPER=""\n275\tfi\n276\t\n277\t# Run compilation\n278\t$SYSTEMD_WRAPPER "$PYTHON_BIN" -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n279\t    --model "$MODEL" \\\n280\t    --tensor-parallel-size "$TP_SIZE" \\\n281\t    --max-model-len "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \\\n282\t    --max-num-seqs "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \\\n283\t    --block-size "$BLOCK_SIZE" \\\n284\t    --num-gpu-blocks-override "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" \\\n285\t    --enable-prefix-caching \\\n286\t    --additional-config "$ADDITIONAL_CONFIG" \\\n287\t    --port 6008 \\\n288\t    || {\n289\t        echo ""\n290\t        echo "Compilation failed. Check logs above."\n291\t        echo "Common issues:"\n292\t        echo "  - Insufficient memory: reduce VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS"\n293\t        echo "  - Invalid neuron_config: check $NEURON_CONFIG_FILE"\n294\t        echo "  - Bucket mismatch: kv_segment_size_buckets must match num_batched_tokens_buckets"\n295\t        exit 1\n296\t    }\n297\t\n298\techo ""\n299\techo "=== Compilation Complete ==="\n300\techo "Artifacts saved to: $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n301\techo "To serve: bash $SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash"\n302\t```\n303\t\n304\t**关键改进：**\n305\t1. 从 `config/tongyi.env` 加载所有配置\n306\t2. 从 `config/tongyi_neuron_config.json` 读取 neuron_config（JSON格式，易于编辑）\n307\t3. 自动检测 Docker 环境\n308\t4. 显示完整配置供确认\n309\t5. 友好的错误提示\n310\t\n311\t#### 2.2 `compile_judge.bash`（新版）\n312\t\n313\t类似结构，加载 `config/judge.env` 和 `config/judge_neuron_config.json`。\n314\t\n315\t#### 2.3 `compile_embedding.bash`（轻微调整）\n316\t\n317\t保持 Optimum Neuron 调用，仅更新：\n318\t- 从 `config/embedding.env` 读取配置\n319\t- 更新 cache 路径变量\n320\t\n321\t### 3. 服务脚本重构\n322\t\n323\t#### 3.1 `serve_tongyi.bash`（新版）\n324\t\n325\t```bash\n326\t#!/usr/bin/env bash\n327\tset -euo pipefail\n328\t\n329\tSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\n330\tREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"\n331\tCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/config"\n332\t\n333\t# Load configuration\n334\tsource "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env"\n335\t\n336\t# Detect environment\n337\tif [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then\n338\t    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"\n339\telse\n340\t    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"\n341\tfi\n342\t\n343\t# Read neuron_config\n344\tADDITIONAL_CONFIG="$(cat "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi_neuron_config.json")"\n345\t\n346\t# Resolve paths\n347\tif [[ "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" != /* ]]; then\n348\t    NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$REPO_ROOT/$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n349\tfi\n350\t\n351\t# Check artifacts exist\n352\tif [[ ! -f "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS/model.pt" ]]; then\n353\t    echo "Error: No compiled artifacts at $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" >&2\n354\t    echo "Run: bash $SCRIPT_DIR/compile_tongyi.bash" >&2\n355\t    exit 1\n356\tfi\n357\t\n358\t# Port configuration\n359\tPORT="${PORT:-6008}"\n360\t\n361\techo "=== Tongyi-30B Server ==="\n362\techo "Port: $PORT"\n363\techo "Artifacts: $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n364\techo ""\n365\t\n366\t# Runtime environment\n367\texport NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS\n368\texport NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES\n369\texport VLLM_CACHE_ROOT\n370\texport VLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL\n371\t\n372\t# Serve\n373\texec "$PYTHON_BIN" -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n374\t    --model "$MODEL" \\\n375\t    --tensor-parallel-size "$TP_SIZE" \\\n376\t    --max-model-len "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \\\n377\t    --max-num-seqs "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \\\n378\t    --block-size "$BLOCK_SIZE" \\\n379\t    --num-gpu-blocks-override "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" \\\n380\t    --enable-prefix-caching \\\n381\t    --additional-config "$ADDITIONAL_CONFIG" \\\n382\t    --port "$PORT" \\\n383\t    --host 0.0.0.0\n384\t```\n385\t\n386\t#### 3.2 `serve_tongyi_cluster.bash`（新版）\n387\t\n388\t保持 NUMA-aware 多副本架构，但：\n389\t1. 从 `config/tongyi.env` 读取配置\n390\t2. 每个副本调用新版 `serve_tongyi.bash`\n391\t3. 传递不同的 `PORT` 和 `NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES`\n392\t\n393\t```bash\n394\t#!/usr/bin/env bash\n395\tset -euo pipefail\n396\t\n397\tSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\n398\tCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/config"\n399\t\n400\t# Load base configuration\n401\tsource "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env"\n402\t\n403\t# Cluster configuration\n404\tFIRST_PORT="${FIRST_PORT:-6008}"\n405\tTONGYI_REPLICAS="${TONGYI_REPLICAS:-7}"\n406\tEMBEDDING_PORT="${EMBEDDING_PORT:-6030}"\n407\t\n408\techo "=== Tongyi-30B Cluster ==="\n409\techo "Replicas: $TONGYI_REPLICAS"\n410\techo "Port range: $FIRST_PORT-$((FIRST_PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS - 1))"\n411\techo ""\n412\t\n413\t# Start embedding server\n414\tPORT="$EMBEDDING_PORT" \\\n415\t    bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_embedding.bash" &\n416\tEMBEDDING_PID=$!\n417\t\n418\t# Start planning replicas\n419\tfor ((replica = 0; replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; replica++)); do\n420\t    port=$((FIRST_PORT + replica))\n421\t    \n422\t    # NUMA-aware core assignment (8 cores per replica, 2 replicas per node)\n423\t    numa_node=$((replica / 2))\n424\t    local_replica=$((replica % 2))\n425\t    core_start=$((numa_node * 16 + local_replica * 8))\n426\t    core_end=$((core_start + 7))\n427\t    cores="${core_start}-${core_end}"\n428\t    \n429\t    echo "Starting replica $replica: port=$port cores=$cores numa=$numa_node"\n430\t    \n431\t    numactl --cpunodebind=$numa_node --membind=$numa_node \\\n432\t        env \\\n433\t        PORT="$port" \\\n434\t        NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$cores" \\\n435\t        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash" \\\n436\t        > "logs/neuron-servers/tongyi-${port}.log" 2>&1 &\n437\t    \n438\t    PIDS+=($!)\n439\tdone\n440\t\n441\t# Wait for readiness\n442\tfor ((replica = 0; replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; replica++)); do\n443\t    port=$((FIRST_PORT + replica))\n444\t    until curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models" >/dev/null 2>&1; do\n445\t        sleep 5\n446\t    done\n447\t    echo "Replica $replica ready (port $port)"\n448\tdone\n449\t\n450\techo "All replicas ready"\n451\twait\n452\t```\n453\t\n454\t### 4. 一键运行脚本更新\n455\t\n456\t#### 4.1 `n_tongyi.bash` 更新\n457\t\n458\t保持主逻辑不变，仅更新：\n459\t1. 调用新版 `serve_tongyi_cluster.bash`\n460\t2. 调用新版 `serve_judge_cluster.bash`\n461\t3. 移除旧的 `OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG` 环境变量传递（现在从配置文件读取）\n462\t\n463\t**关键变更：**\n464\t\n465\t```bash\n466\t# 旧版（删除）：\n467\tOVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG=\'...\' \\\n468\tNEURON_SCHEDULER=custom \\\n469\tbash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash" &\n470\t\n471\t# 新版（简化）：\n472\tbash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash" &\n473\t```\n474\t\n475\t所有配置在 `config/*.env` 和 `config/*.json` 中，无需在启动脚本中传递。\n476\t\n477\t### 5. 配置文档\n478\t\n479\t创建 `bash/neuron/config/README.md`，详细说明：\n480\t\n481\t```markdown\n482\t# Neuron 配置指南\n483\t\n484\t本目录包含三个模型的编译和运行时配置。\n485\t\n486\t## 文件结构\n487\t\n488\t- `tongyi.env` - Tongyi-30B planning模型环境变量\n489\t- `tongyi_neuron_config.json` - Tongyi neuron_config（bucket配置）\n490\t- `judge.env` - Qwen3-32B judge模型环境变量\n491\t- `judge_neuron_config.json` - Judge neuron_config\n492\t- `embedding.env` - Qwen3-Embedding-8B配置\n493\t\n494\t## 配置参数详解\n495\t\n496\t### 通用环境变量\n497\t\n498\t| 变量 | 说明 | 默认值 | 调整建议 |\n499\t|------|------|--------|----------|\n500\t| `VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS` | 并行编译worker数 | 8 | trn2.3xlarge最大8，减少可降低内存压力 |\n501\t| `NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES` | 运行时可见的Neuron core | "0-31" | 多副本时按NUMA分配 |\n502\t| `MAX_MODEL_LEN` | 模型最大上下文长度 | 128000 | 越大内存占用越高 |\n503\t| `MAX_NUM_SEQS` | 最大并发序列数 | 2 | 增加可提高吞吐，但需更多内存 |\n504\t| `BLOCK_SIZE` | KV cache block大小 | 32 | 32-128，越小浪费越少但管理开销越大 |\n505\t\n506\t### Neuron Config 参数\n507\t\n508\t#### `num_batched_tokens_buckets`\n509\t每次prefill处理的token数量buckets。\n510\t\n511\t**示例：**\n512\t- `[16384]` - 单bucket，128K context分8次prefill\n513\t- `[8192, 16384]` - 双bucket，自动选择合适大小\n514\t\n515\t**权衡：**\n516\t- 更大bucket → 更少iteration，首token延迟更高\n517\t- 更小bucket → 更多iteration，吞吐可能降低\n518\t\n519\t#### `num_seqs_buckets`\n520\t并发decode序列数buckets。\n521\t\n522\t**规则：**\n523\t- 必须包含 `1` 和 `MAX_NUM_SEQS`\n524\t- 建议覆盖 `[1, 2, ..., MAX_NUM_SEQS]`\n525\t\n526\t**示例：**\n527\t- `MAX_NUM_SEQS=2` → `[1, 2]`\n528\t- `MAX_NUM_SEQS=4` → `[1, 2, 4]`（节省编译时间）\n529\t\n530\t#### `kv_segment_size_buckets`\n531\tSegmented prefill的segment大小。\n532\t\n533\t**重要约束：**\n534\t- **必须与 `num_batched_tokens_buckets` 完全匹配**\n535\t- 例如：prefill=[16384] → segment=[16384]\n536\t\n537\t#### `decode_context_length_buckets`（可选）\n538\t优化不同KV长度的decode性能。\n539\t\n540\t**示例：**\n541\t```json\n542\t"decode_context_length_buckets": [16384, 32768, 65536, 98304, 128000]\n543\t```\n544\t\n545\t避免为每个长度编译完整NEFF，节省编译时间。\n546\t\n547\t#### `on_device_sampling_config`\n548\t**必需配置**（async scheduling默认开启）。\n549\t\n550\t**选项：**\n551\t1. 全贪心：`{"all_greedy": true}`\n552\t2. Temperature采样：`{"temperature": "0.7"}`（注意：字符串类型）\n553\t\n554\t## 快速调整场景\n555\t\n556\t### 降低内存占用\n557\t```bash\n558\t# tongyi.env\n559\tVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=4  # 减少并行度\n560\tMAX_NUM_SEQS=1                         # 减少并发\n561\tNUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=6000           # 减少KV cache blocks\n562\t```\n563\t\n564\t### 提高吞吐量\n565\t```bash\n566\t# tongyi.env\n567\tMAX_NUM_SEQS=4                         # 增加并发\n568\t```\n569\t\n570\t```json\n571\t// tongyi_neuron_config.json\n572\t"num_seqs_buckets": [1, 2, 4]\n573\t```\n574\t\n575\t### 降低首token延迟\n576\t```json\n577\t// tongyi_neuron_config.json\n578\t"num_batched_tokens_buckets": [8192]   // 更小bucket\n579\t```\n580\t\n581\t### 编译失败排查\n582\t\n583\t**现象1：OOM during compilation**\n584\t```bash\n585\t# 解决：减少并行度\n586\tVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=2\n587\t```\n588\t\n589\t**现象2：Bucket mismatch error**\n590\t```\n591\tkv_segment_size_buckets must match num_batched_tokens_buckets\n592\t```\n593\t```json\n594\t// 解决：确保两者一致\n595\t"num_batched_tokens_buckets": [16384],\n596\t"kv_segment_size_buckets": [16384]\n597\t```\n598\t\n599\t**现象3：On-device sampling required**\n600\t```\n601\tAsyncScheduler requires on_device_sampling_config\n602\t```\n603\t```json\n604\t// 解决：添加on-device sampling配置\n605\t"on_device_sampling_config": {\n606\t  "all_greedy": true\n607\t}\n608\t```\n609\t\n610\t## 参考资料\n611\t\n612\t- [vLLM-Neuron Setup Guide](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-neuron/blob/release-0.21.0.1.0.0/docs/getting-started/setup-guide.md)\n613\t- [Reference Configuration](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-neuron/blob/release-0.21.0.1.0.0/docs/guides/reference-configuration.md)\n614\t```\n615\t\n616\t## 验证方案\n617\t\n618\t### 阶段1：配置文件创建\n619\t\n620\t1. 创建 `bash/neuron/config/` 目录\n621\t2. 写入5个配置文件（3个 .env + 2个 .json）\n622\t3. 写入配置文档 `config/README.md`\n623\t\n624\t**验证命令：**\n625\t```bash\n626\tls -lh bash/neuron/config/\n627\tjq . bash/neuron/config/tongyi_neuron_config.json  # 验证JSON有效\n628\tsource bash/neuron/config/tongyi.env && echo $MODEL  # 验证ENV有效\n629\t```\n630\t\n631\t### 阶段2：Tongyi编译脚本测试\n632\t\n633\t1. 创建新版 `compile_tongyi.bash`\n634\t2. 在Docker容器中编译Tongyi（≤8 workers）\n635\t\n636\t**验证命令：**\n637\t```bash\n638\t# 在容器内\n639\tcd /dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus\n640\tbash bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash\n641\t\n642\t# 验证artifacts\n643\tls -lh local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/tongyi-128k-tp8-v0.21.0/\n644\t# 应包含 model.pt 和其他 .pt 文件\n645\t```\n646\t\n647\t**预期时间：** 30-60分钟（首次编译）\n648\t\n649\t### 阶段3：Tongyi服务脚本测试\n650\t\n651\t1. 创建新版 `serve_tongyi.bash`\n652\t2. 启动单实例测试\n653\t\n654\t**验证命令：**\n655\t```bash\n656\t# 在容器内\n657\tPORT=6008 bash [{'type': 'tool_use', 'id': 'toolu_bdrk_014DPCww237oLXYg1hsey3jT', 'name': 'Write', 'input': {'file_path': '/dev3/cc/plans/fluffy-tickling-waffle.md', 'content': '# bash/neuron/ 脚本重构 - vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0\n\n## Context\n\n当前 bash/neuron/ 脚本基于旧版 vLLM-Neuron (NxDI/0.16.0) 编写，配置格式过时。需要迁移到 Docker 环境 (browsecomp-neuron:0.21.0) 和 vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0。\n\n**硬件：** trn2.3xlarge — 1 Neuron device × 4 cores，TP_SIZE 最大 = 4  \n**运行模式：** 三个模型分时运行（同时只跑一个）  \n**范围：** 只重构 compile 和 serve 脚本，n_tongyi.bash / n_tongyi_get.bash 暂不动\n\n**三个模型：**\n1. Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B — TP=4, 极小 suffix bucket（适配4-core）\n2. Qwen3-32B (Judge) — TP=4, 8K context\n3. Qwen3-Embedding-8B — Optimum Neuron（不走vLLM）\n\n**vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0 关键变化：**\n\n| 旧 (NxDI) | 新 (0.21.0) |\n|-----------|-------------|\n| `{"override_neuron_config": {...}}` | `{"neuron_config": {...}}` |\n| `context_encoding_buckets` | `num_batched_tokens_buckets` |\n| `prefix_buckets` | 移除（自动管理） |\n| `token_generation_buckets` | 隐式，由 max_model_len 决定 |\n| `NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS` | `VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS` |\n| `NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom/native` | 移除，统一调度器 |\n| 无 | `on_device_sampling_config`（**必需**，async scheduling 默认开启）|\n| 无 | `kv_segment_size_buckets`（segmented prefill，**必须=num_batched_tokens_buckets**）|\n\n## 方案\n\n### 目标结构\n\n```\nbash/neuron/\n├── config/\n│   ├── tongyi.env                    # Tongyi 环境变量\n│   ├── tongyi_neuron_config.json     # Tongyi neuron_config\n│   ├── judge.env                     # Judge 环境变量\n│   ├── judge_neuron_config.json      # Judge neuron_config\n│   ├── embedding.env                 # Embedding 环境变量\n│   └── README.md                     # 配置指南（参数说明）\n├── compile_tongyi.bash               # 重写\n├── compile_judge.bash                # 重写（原 compile_qwen3_32b_judge.bash）\n├── compile_embedding.bash            # 轻微调整（从config读取）\n├── serve_tongyi.bash                 # 重写\n├── serve_judge.bash                  # 重写（原 serve_qwen3_32b_judge.bash）\n├── serve_embedding.bash              # 轻微调整（从config读取）\n├── serve_tongyi_cluster.bash         # 保留结构，更新调用（留给大机器）\n├── serve_judge_cluster.bash          # 同上（原 serve_qwen3_32b_judge_cluster.bash）\n├── n_tongyi.bash                     # 不动\n├── n_tongyi_get.bash                 # 不动\n├── run_tongyi_neuron.bash            # 不动\n├── evaluate_with_neuron_judge.bash   # 不动\n├── check_neuron_env.bash             # 不动\n├── download_*.bash                   # 不动\n└── archive-pre-dlc/                  # 已有归档\n```\n\n### 设计原则\n\n1. **配置分离**：所有参数在 `config/` 中，脚本从文件读取\n2. **用户自主配置**：用户编辑 .env 和 .json，无需改脚本\n3. **Docker 优先**：假设在容器中运行，保留 Docker 自动检测兼容宿主机\n4. **编译 worker ≤ 8**：默认 4（适配 4-core 机器内存）\n\n### 配置文件内容\n\n#### `config/tongyi.env`\n\n```bash\n# Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B — trn2.3xlarge (4 cores)\nMODEL="Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B"\nTP_SIZE=4\nMAX_MODEL_LEN=32768\nMAX_NUM_SEQS=1\nBLOCK_SIZE=32\nNUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=4000\nVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=4\nNEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="0-3"\nNEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/tongyi-32k-tp4-v0.21.0"\nVLLM_CACHE_ROOT="local-models/vllm-cache"\nVLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL=INFO\n```\n\n#### `config/tongyi_neuron_config.json`\n\n```json\n{\n  "neuron_config": {\n    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [4096],\n    "num_seqs_buckets": [1],\n    "kv_segment_size_buckets": [4096],\n    "on_device_sampling_config": {\n      "all_greedy": true\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n#### `config/judge.env`\n\n```bash\n# Qwen3-32B Judge — trn2.3xlarge (4 cores)\nMODEL="Qwen/Qwen3-32B"\nTP_SIZE=4\nMAX_MODEL_LEN=8192\nMAX_NUM_SEQS=1\nBLOCK_SIZE=128\nNUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=2048\nVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=4\nNEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="0-3"\nNEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/judge-8k-tp4-v0.21.0"\nVLLM_CACHE_ROOT="local-models/vllm-cache"\nVLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL=INFO\n```\n\n#### `config/judge_neuron_config.json`\n\n```json\n{\n  "neuron_config": {\n    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [512, 1024, 2048, 4096, 8192],\n    "num_seqs_buckets": [1],\n    "on_device_sampling_config": {\n      "all_greedy": true\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n#### `config/embedding.env`\n\n```bash\n# Qwen3-Embedding-8B — Optimum Neuron\nMODEL="Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B"\nTP_SIZE=4\nBATCH_SIZE=2\nSEQUENCE_LENGTH=1024\nINSTANCE_TYPE="trn2"\nEMBEDDING_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/qwen3-embedding-8b"\n```\n\n### 脚本模板\n\n#### `compile_tongyi.bash` / `compile_judge.bash`\n\n共同模式：\n\n```bash\n#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\nSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\nREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"\nCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/config"\n\n# 1. 加载 config/<model>.env\nsource "$CONFIG_DIR/<model>.env"\n\n# 2. Docker 检测\nif [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"\nelse\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"\nfi\n\n# 3. 读取 neuron_config JSON\nADDITIONAL_CONFIG="$(cat "$CONFIG_DIR/<model>_neuron_config.json")"\n\n# 4. 解析路径（相对→绝对）\n[[ "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" == /* ]] || NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$REPO_ROOT/$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n[[ "$VLLM_CACHE_ROOT" == /* ]] || VLLM_CACHE_ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/$VLLM_CACHE_ROOT"\nmkdir -p "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n\n# 5. 打印配置摘要\n\n# 6. export 环境变量\nexport VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS\nexport NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES VLLM_CACHE_ROOT VLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL\n\n# 7. 启动 vLLM（编译发生在首次加载时）\n"$PYTHON_BIN" -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n    --model "$MODEL" \\\n    --tensor-parallel-size "$TP_SIZE" \\\n    --max-model-len "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \\\n    --max-num-seqs "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \\\n    --block-size "$BLOCK_SIZE" \\\n    --num-gpu-blocks-override "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" \\\n    --enable-prefix-caching \\\n    --additional-config "$ADDITIONAL_CONFIG" \\\n    --port 9999\n```\n\n#### `serve_tongyi.bash` / `serve_judge.bash`\n\n类似 compile，但：\n- 检查 artifacts 是否存在（`model.pt`）\n- 使用 `exec` 启动（方便 signal 传递）\n- PORT 从环境变量或默认值\n\n#### `serve_tongyi_cluster.bash` / `serve_judge_cluster.bash`\n\n保留 NUMA-aware 多副本结构，从 config 读取配置，循环调用 `serve_tongyi.bash` / `serve_judge.bash` 并传递不同 PORT 和 NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES。大机器用时用户改 config 里的 TP_SIZE 和 NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES 即可。\n\n#### `compile_embedding.bash` / `serve_embedding.bash`\n\n保持 Optimum Neuron 调用方式，仅改为从 `config/embedding.env` 读取参数。\n\n### 旧脚本处理\n\n将被重写的旧脚本先归档：\n```bash\nmv bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/compile_qwen3_32b_judge.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/compile_qwen3_embedding.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_tongyi.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_qwen3_32b_judge.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_qwen3_embedding.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_qwen3_32b_judge_cluster.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_vllm_neuron.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\n```\n\n## 实施步骤\n\n1. **归档旧脚本** → archive-pre-dlc/\n2. **创建 config/ 目录和6个配置文件**\n3. **写 compile_tongyi.bash** — Tongyi 编译\n4. **写 compile_judge.bash** — Judge 编译\n5. **写 compile_embedding.bash** — Embedding 编译（从config读取）\n6. **写 serve_tongyi.bash** — Tongyi 单实例服务\n7. **写 serve_judge.bash** — Judge 单实例服务\n8. **写 serve_embedding.bash** — Embedding 服务（从config读取）\n9. **写 serve_tongyi_cluster.bash** — Tongyi 集群（大机器用）\n10. **写 serve_judge_cluster.bash** — Judge 集群（大机器用）\n\n## 验证\n\n```bash\n# 在容器内验证配置文件\njq . bash/neuron/config/tongyi_neuron_config.json\nsource bash/neuron/config/tongyi.env && echo "$MODEL TP=$TP_SIZE"\n\n# 编译测试（选一个模型）\nbash bash/neuron/compile_judge.bash\n# 等待编译完成，检查 artifacts\nls local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/judge-8k-tp4-v0.21.0/\n\n# 服务测试\nbash bash/neuron/serve_judge.bash &\nuntil curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:6008/v1/models; do sleep 5; done\ncurl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:6008/v1/completions \\\n  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\\n  -d \'{"model":"Qwen/Qwen3-32B","prompt":"Hello","max_tokens":10}\'\n```\n'}}]

Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B — TP=4, 极小 suffix bucket（适配4-core）\n2. Qwen3-32B (Judge) — TP=4, 8K context\n3. Qwen3-Embedding-8B — Optimum Neuron（不走vLLM）\n\n**vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0 关键变化：**\n\n| 旧 (NxDI) | 新 (0.21.0) |\n|-----------|-------------|\n| `{"override_neuron_config": {...}}` | `{"neuron_config": {...}}` |\n| `context_encoding_buckets` | `num_batched_tokens_buckets` |\n| `prefix_buckets` | 移除（自动管理） |\n| `token_generation_buckets` | 隐式，由 max_model_len 决定 |\n| `NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS` | `VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS` |\n| `NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom/native` | 移除，统一调度器 |\n| 无 | `on_device_sampling_config`（**必需**，async scheduling 默认开启）|\n| 无 | `kv_segment_size_buckets`（segmented prefill，**必须=num_batched_tokens_buckets**）|\n\n## 方案\n\n### 目标结构\n\n```\nbash/neuron/\n├── config/\n│   ├── tongyi.env                    # Tongyi 环境变量\n│   ├── tongyi_neuron_config.json     # Tongyi neuron_config\n│   ├── judge.env                     # Judge 环境变量\n│   ├── judge_neuron_config.json      # Judge neuron_config\n│   ├── embedding.env                 # Embedding 环境变量\n│   └── README.md                     # 配置指南（参数说明）\n├── compile_tongyi.bash               # 重写\n├── compile_judge.bash                # 重写（原 compile_qwen3_32b_judge.bash）\n├── compile_embedding.bash            # 轻微调整（从config读取）\n├── serve_tongyi.bash                 # 重写\n├── serve_judge.bash                  # 重写（原 serve_qwen3_32b_judge.bash）\n├── serve_embedding.bash              # 轻微调整（从config读取）\n├── serve_tongyi_cluster.bash         # 保留结构，更新调用（留给大机器）\n├── serve_judge_cluster.bash          # 同上（原 serve_qwen3_32b_judge_cluster.bash）\n├── n_tongyi.bash                     # 不动\n├── n_tongyi_get.bash                 # 不动\n├── run_tongyi_neuron.bash            # 不动\n├── evaluate_with_neuron_judge.bash   # 不动\n├── check_neuron_env.bash             # 不动\n├── download_*.bash                   # 不动\n└── archive-pre-dlc/                  # 已有归档\n```\n\n### 设计原则\n\n1. **配置分离**：所有参数在 `config/` 中，脚本从文件读取\n2. **用户自主配置**：用户编辑 .env 和 .json，无需改脚本\n3. **Docker 优先**：假设在容器中运行，保留 Docker 自动检测兼容宿主机\n4. **编译 worker ≤ 8**：默认 4（适配 4-core 机器内存）\n\n### 配置文件内容\n\n#### `config/tongyi.env`\n\n```bash\n# Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B — trn2.3xlarge (4 cores)\nMODEL="Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B"\nTP_SIZE=4\nMAX_MODEL_LEN=32768\nMAX_NUM_SEQS=1\nBLOCK_SIZE=32\nNUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=4000\nVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=4\nNEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="0-3"\nNEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/tongyi-32k-tp4-v0.21.0"\nVLLM_CACHE_ROOT="local-models/vllm-cache"\nVLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL=INFO\n```\n\n#### `config/tongyi_neuron_config.json`\n\n```json\n{\n  "neuron_config": {\n    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [4096],\n    "num_seqs_buckets": [1],\n    "kv_segment_size_buckets": [4096],\n    "on_device_sampling_config": {\n      "all_greedy": true\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n#### `config/judge.env`\n\n```bash\n# Qwen3-32B Judge — trn2.3xlarge (4 cores)\nMODEL="Qwen/Qwen3-32B"\nTP_SIZE=4\nMAX_MODEL_LEN=8192\nMAX_NUM_SEQS=1\nBLOCK_SIZE=128\nNUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=2048\nVLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS=4\nNEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="0-3"\nNEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/judge-8k-tp4-v0.21.0"\nVLLM_CACHE_ROOT="local-models/vllm-cache"\nVLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL=INFO\n```\n\n#### `config/judge_neuron_config.json`\n\n```json\n{\n  "neuron_config": {\n    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [512, 1024, 2048, 4096, 8192],\n    "num_seqs_buckets": [1],\n    "on_device_sampling_config": {\n      "all_greedy": true\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n#### `config/embedding.env`\n\n```bash\n# Qwen3-Embedding-8B — Optimum Neuron\nMODEL="Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B"\nTP_SIZE=4\nBATCH_SIZE=2\nSEQUENCE_LENGTH=1024\nINSTANCE_TYPE="trn2"\nEMBEDDING_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/qwen3-embedding-8b"\n```\n\n### 脚本模板\n\n#### `compile_tongyi.bash` / `compile_judge.bash`\n\n共同模式：\n\n```bash\n#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\nSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\nREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"\nCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/config"\n\n# 1. 加载 config/<model>.env\nsource "$CONFIG_DIR/<model>.env"\n\n# 2. Docker 检测\nif [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"\nelse\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"\nfi\n\n# 3. 读取 neuron_config JSON\nADDITIONAL_CONFIG="$(cat "$CONFIG_DIR/<model>_neuron_config.json")"\n\n# 4. 解析路径（相对→绝对）\n[[ "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" == /* ]] || NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$REPO_ROOT/$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n[[ "$VLLM_CACHE_ROOT" == /* ]] || VLLM_CACHE_ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/$VLLM_CACHE_ROOT"\nmkdir -p "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n\n# 5. 打印配置摘要\n\n# 6. export 环境变量\nexport VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS\nexport NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES VLLM_CACHE_ROOT VLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL\n\n# 7. 启动 vLLM（编译发生在首次加载时）\n"$PYTHON_BIN" -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n    --model "$MODEL" \\\n    --tensor-parallel-size "$TP_SIZE" \\\n    --max-model-len "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \\\n    --max-num-seqs "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \\\n    --block-size "$BLOCK_SIZE" \\\n    --num-gpu-blocks-override "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" \\\n    --enable-prefix-caching \\\n    --additional-config "$ADDITIONAL_CONFIG" \\\n    --port 9999\n```\n\n#### `serve_tongyi.bash` / `serve_judge.bash`\n\n类似 compile，但：\n- 检查 artifacts 是否存在（`model.pt`）\n- 使用 `exec` 启动（方便 signal 传递）\n- PORT 从环境变量或默认值\n\n#### `serve_tongyi_cluster.bash` / `serve_judge_cluster.bash`\n\n保留 NUMA-aware 多副本结构，从 config 读取配置，循环调用 `serve_tongyi.bash` / `serve_judge.bash` 并传递不同 PORT 和 NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES。大机器用时用户改 config 里的 TP_SIZE 和 NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES 即可。\n\n#### `compile_embedding.bash` / `serve_embedding.bash`\n\n保持 Optimum Neuron 调用方式，仅改为从 `config/embedding.env` 读取参数。\n\n### 旧脚本处理\n\n将被重写的旧脚本先归档：\n```bash\nmv bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/compile_qwen3_32b_judge.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/compile_qwen3_embedding.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_tongyi.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_qwen3_32b_judge.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_qwen3_embedding.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_qwen3_32b_judge_cluster.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_vllm_neuron.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\n```\n\n## 实施步骤\n\n1. **归档旧脚本** → archive-pre-dlc/\n2. **创建 config/ 目录和6个配置文件**\n3. **写 compile_tongyi.bash** — Tongyi 编译\n4. **写 compile_judge.bash** — Judge 编译\n5. **写 compile_embedding.bash** — Embedding 编译（从config读取）\n6. **写 serve_tongyi.bash** — Tongyi 单实例服务\n7. **写 serve_judge.bash** — Judge 单实例服务\n8. **写 serve_embedding.bash** — Embedding 服务（从config读取）\n9. **写 serve_tongyi_cluster.bash** — Tongyi 集群（大机器用）\n10. **写 serve_judge_cluster.bash** — Judge 集群（大机器用）\n\n## 验证\n\nClaude Code 只负责生成脚本和配置文件。编译和服务测试由用户手动进行。\n\n**Claude Code 验证（即时）：**\n```bash\n# 验证配置文件语法\njq . bash/neuron/config/tongyi_neuron_config.json\njq . bash/neuron/config/judge_neuron_config.json\nsource bash/neuron/config/tongyi.env && echo "$MODEL TP=$TP_SIZE"\nsource bash/neuron/config/judge.env && echo "$MODEL TP=$TP_SIZE"\n# 验证脚本可执行\nbash -n bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash\nbash -n bash/neuron/serve_tongyi.bash\n```\n\n**用户手动验证（耗时）：**\n```bash\n# 编译（30-60分钟/模型）\nbash bash/neuron/compile_judge.bash\nbash 脚本模板\n\n#### `compile_tongyi.bash` / `compile_judge.bash`\n\n共同模式：\n\n```bash\n#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\nSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\nREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"\nCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/config"\n\n# 1. 加载 config/<model>.env\nsource "$CONFIG_DIR/<model>.env"\n\n# 2. Docker 检测\nif [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"\nelse\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"\nfi\n\n# 3. 读取 neuron_config JSON\nADDITIONAL_CONFIG="$(cat "$CONFIG_DIR/<model>_neuron_config.json")"\n\n# 4. 解析路径（相对→绝对）\n[[ "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" == /* ]] || NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$REPO_ROOT/$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n[[ "$VLLM_CACHE_ROOT" == /* ]] || VLLM_CACHE_ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/$VLLM_CACHE_ROOT"\nmkdir -p "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n\n# 5. 打印配置摘要\n\n# 6. export 环境变量\nexport VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS\nexport NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES VLLM_CACHE_ROOT VLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL\n\n# 7. 启动 vLLM（编译发生在首次加载时）\n"$PYTHON_BIN" -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n    --model "$MODEL" \\\n    --tensor-parallel-size "$TP_SIZE" \\\n    --max-model-len "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \\\n    --max-num-seqs "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \\\n    --block-size "$BLOCK_SIZE" \\\n    --num-gpu-blocks-override "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" \\\n    --enable-prefix-caching \\\n    --additional-config "$ADDITIONAL_CONFIG" \\\n    --port 9999\n```\n\n#### `serve_tongyi.bash` / `serve_judge.bash`\n\n类似 compile，但：\n- 检查 artifacts 是否存在（`model.pt`）\n- 使用 `exec` 启动（方便 signal 传递）\n- PORT 从环境变量或默认值\n\n#### `serve_tongyi_cluster.bash` / `serve_judge_cluster.bash`\n\n保留 NUMA-aware 多副本结构，从 config 读取配置，循环调用 `serve_tongyi.bash` / `serve_judge.bash` 并传递不同 PORT 和 NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES。大机器用时用户改 config 里的 TP_SIZE 和 NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES 即可。\n\n#### `compile_embedding.bash` / `serve_embedding.bash`\n\n保持 Optimum Neuron 调用方式，仅改为从 `config/embedding.env` 读取参数。\n\n### 旧脚本处理\n\n将被重写的旧脚本先归档：\n```bash\nmv bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/compile_qwen3_32b_judge.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/compile_qwen3_embedding.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_tongyi.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_qwen3_32b_judge.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_qwen3_embedding.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_qwen3_32b_judge_cluster.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\nmv bash/neuron/serve_vllm_neuron.bash bash/neuron/archive-pre-dlc/\n```\n\n## 实施步骤\n\n1. **归档旧脚本** → archive-pre-dlc/\n2. **创建 config/ 目录和6个配置文件**\n3. **写 compile_tongyi.bash** — Tongyi 编译\n4. **写 compile_judge.bash** — Judge 编译\n5. **写 compile_embedding.bash** — Embedding 编译（从config读取）\n6. **写 serve_tongyi.bash** — Tongyi 单实例服务\n7. **写 serve_judge.bash** — Judge 单实例服务\n8. **写 serve_embedding.bash** — Embedding 服务（从config读取）\n9. **写 serve_tongyi_cluster.bash** — Tongyi 集群（大机器用）\n10. **写 serve_judge_cluster.bash** — Judge 集群（大机器用）\n\n## 验证\n\nClaude Code 只负责生成脚本和配置文件。编译和服务测试由用户手动进行。\n\n**Claude Code 验证（即时）：**\n```bash\n# 验证配置文件语法\njq . bash/neuron/config/tongyi_neuron_config.json\njq . bash/neuron/config/judge_neuron_config.json\nsource bash/neuron/config/tongyi.env && echo "$MODEL TP=$TP_SIZE"\nsource bash/neuron/config/judge.env && echo "$MODEL TP=$TP_SIZE"\n# 验证脚本可执行\nbash -n bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash\nbash -n bash/neuron/serve_tongyi.bash\n```\n\n**用户手动验证（耗时）：**\n```bash\n# 编译（30-60分钟/模型）\nbash bash/neuron/compile_judge.bash\nbash bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash\n\n# 服务\nbash bash/neuron/serve_judge.bash\nbash bash/neuron/serve_tongyi.bash\n```\n', 'tool_use_id': 'toolu_bdrk_013Ph71xoNhGieFbosppJP2s'}]

[{'type': 'tool_use', 'id': 'toolu_bdrk_01X3L9Nb6gxAZBaHgfnpjGjw', 'name': 'Write', 'input': {'file_path': '/dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus/bash/neuron/config/README.md', 'content': '# Neuron Configuration Guide\n\nThis directory contains configuration for three models compiled and served with vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0.\n\n## Files\n\n| File | Model | Purpose |\n|------|-------|---------|\n| `tongyi.env` | Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B | Environment variables (TP, context len, workers) |\n| `tongyi_neuron_config.json` | Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B | Neuron bucket config |\n| `judge.env` | Qwen3-32B | Environment variables |\n| `judge_neuron_config.json` | Qwen3-32B | Neuron bucket config |\n| `embedding.env` | Qwen3-Embedding-8B | Optimum Neuron config |\n\n## Key Parameters\n\n### Environment Variables (*.env)\n\n| Variable | Description | Notes |\n|----------|-------------|-------|\n| `TP_SIZE` | Tensor parallel size | Must ≤ available Neuron cores |\n| `MAX_MODEL_LEN` | Maximum sequence length | Larger = more memory |\n| `MAX_NUM_SEQS` | Max concurrent sequences | Larger = more throughput, more memory |\n| `VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS` | Parallel compilation workers | ≤8 for trn2.3xlarge |\n| `NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES` | Visible Neuron cores | e.g. "0-3" for 4 cores |\n| `BLOCK_SIZE` | KV cache block size | 32-128 |\n| `NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE` | Total KV cache blocks | More = more prefix cache capacity |\n| `NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS` | Path to compiled model artifacts | Relative or absolute |\n\n### Neuron Config (*_neuron_config.json)\n\n| Parameter | Description | Constraint |\n|-----------|-------------|------------|\n| `num_batched_tokens_buckets` | Tokens processed per prefill step | Determines compilation targets |\n| `num_seqs_buckets` | Concurrent decode sequences | Must cover [1..MAX_NUM_SEQS] |\n| `kv_segment_size_buckets` | Segmented prefill segment size | **Must equal num_batched_tokens_buckets** |\n| `decode_context_length_buckets` | Decode KV length optimization | Optional, reduces NEFF count |\n| `on_device_sampling_config` | Sampling strategy | **Required** for async scheduling |\n\n### on_device_sampling_config Options\n\nGreedy (deterministic):\n```json\n"on_device_sampling_config": {"all_greedy": true}\n```\n\nTemperature sampling:\n```json\n"on_device_sampling_config": {"temperature": "0.7"}\n```\n\nNote: temperature value must be a **string**, not a number.\n\n## Scaling to Larger Machines\n\nTo run on trn2.48xlarge (64 cores):\n\n1. Edit `tongyi.env`:\n   ```bash\n   TP_SIZE=8\n   MAX_MODEL_LEN=128000\n   MAX_NUM_SEQS=2\n   NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=8000\n   NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="0-7"\n   NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/tongyi-128k-tp8-v0.21.0"\n   ```\n\n2. Edit `tongyi_neuron_config.json`:\n   ```json\n   {\n     "neuron_config": {\n       "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [16384],\n       "num_seqs_buckets": [1, 2],\n       "kv_segment_size_buckets": [16384],\n       "decode_context_length_buckets": [16384, 32768, 65536, 98304, 128000],\n       "on_device_sampling_config": {"all_greedy": true}\n     }\n   }\n   ```\n\n3. Recompile: `bash bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash`\n\n## Troubleshooting\n\n**OOM during compilation:**\nReduce `VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS` to 2 or 1.\n\n**Bucket mismatch error:**\nEnsure `kv_segment_size_buckets` exactly matches `num_batched_tokens_buckets`.\n\n**"AsyncScheduler requires on_device_sampling_config":**\nAdd `on_device_sampling_config` to your neuron_config JSON.\n\n## References\n\n- [vLLM-Neuron Setup Guide](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-neuron/blob/release-0.21.0.1.0.0/docs/getting-started/setup-guide.md)\n- [Reference Configuration](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-neuron/blob/release-0.21.0.1.0.0/docs/guides/reference-configuration.md)\n'}}]

[{'type': 'tool_use', 'id': 'toolu_bdrk_01DXP1Z1GaRLtuqUVDfjYazk', 'name': 'Write', 'input': {'file_path': '/dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus/bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash', 'content': '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\nSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\nREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"\nCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/config"\n\n# Load configuration\nif [[ ! -f "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env" ]]; then\n    echo "Error: $CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env not found" >&2\n    exit 1\nfi\nsource "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env"\n\n# Docker detection\nif [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"\nelse\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"\nfi\n\n# Read neuron_config JSON\nNEURON_CONFIG_FILE="$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi_neuron_config.json"\nif [[ ! -f "$NEURON_CONFIG_FILE" ]]; then\n    echo "Error: $NEURON_CONFIG_FILE not found" >&2\n    exit 1\nfi\nADDITIONAL_CONFIG="$(cat "$NEURON_CONFIG_FILE")"\n\n# Resolve relative paths\n[[ "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" == /* ]] || NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$REPO_ROOT/$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n[[ "$VLLM_CACHE_ROOT" == /* ]] || VLLM_CACHE_ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/$VLLM_CACHE_ROOT"\nmkdir -p "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n\necho "=== Tongyi-30B Compilation (vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0) ==="\necho "Model:       $MODEL"\necho "TP Size:     $TP_SIZE"\necho "Max Len:     $MAX_MODEL_LEN"\necho "Max Seqs:    $MAX_NUM_SEQS"\necho "Workers:     $VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS"\necho "Cores:       $NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES"\necho "Artifacts:   $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\necho "Config:      $NEURON_CONFIG_FILE"\necho ""\necho "Neuron Config:"\ncat "$NEURON_CONFIG_FILE"\necho ""\necho ""\n\nexport VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS\nexport NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS\nexport NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES\nexport VLLM_CACHE_ROOT\nexport VLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL\n\n"$PYTHON_BIN" -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n    --model "$MODEL" \\\n    --tensor-parallel-size "$TP_SIZE" \\\n    --max-model-len "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \\\n    --max-num-seqs "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \\\n    --block-size "$BLOCK_SIZE" \\\n    --num-gpu-blocks-override "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" \\\n    --enable-prefix-caching \\\n    --additional-config "$ADDITIONAL_CONFIG" \\\n    --port 9999\n\necho ""\necho "=== Compilation Complete ==="\necho "Artifacts: $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n'}}]

-f "$CONFIG_DIR/judge.env" ]]; then\n    echo "Error: $CONFIG_DIR/judge.env not found" >&2\n    exit 1\nfi\nsource "$CONFIG_DIR/judge.env"\n\n# Docker detection\nif [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"\nelse\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"\nfi\n\n# Read neuron_config JSON\nNEURON_CONFIG_FILE="$CONFIG_DIR/judge_neuron_config.json"\nif [[ ! -f "$NEURON_CONFIG_FILE" ]]; then\n    echo "Error: $NEURON_CONFIG_FILE not found" >&2\n    exit 1\nfi\nADDITIONAL_CONFIG="$(cat "$NEURON_CONFIG_FILE")"\n\n# Resolve relative paths\n[[ "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" == /* ]] || NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$REPO_ROOT/$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n[[ "$VLLM_CACHE_ROOT" == /* ]] || VLLM_CACHE_ROOT="$REPO_ROOT/$VLLM_CACHE_ROOT"\nmkdir -p "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n\necho "=== Qwen3-32B Judge Compilation (vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0) ==="\necho "Model:       $MODEL"\necho "TP Size:     $TP_SIZE"\necho "Max Len:     $MAX_MODEL_LEN"\necho "Max Seqs:    $MAX_NUM_SEQS"\necho "Workers:     $VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS"\necho "Cores:       $NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES"\necho "Artifacts:   $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\necho "Config:      $NEURON_CONFIG_FILE"\necho ""\necho "Neuron Config:"\ncat "$NEURON_CONFIG_FILE"\necho ""\necho ""\n\nexport VLLM_NEURON_PARALLEL_COMPILE_WORKERS\nexport NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS\nexport NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES\nexport VLLM_CACHE_ROOT\nexport VLLM_NEURON_LOG_LEVEL\n\n"$PYTHON_BIN" -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \\\n    --model "$MODEL" \\\n    --tensor-parallel-size "$TP_SIZE" \\\n    --max-model-len "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \\\n    --max-num-seqs "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \\\n    --block-size "$BLOCK_SIZE" \\\n    --num-gpu-blocks-override "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" \\\n    --enable-prefix-caching \\\n    --additional-config "$ADDITIONAL_CONFIG" \\\n    --port 9999\n\necho ""\necho "=== Compilation Complete ==="\necho "Artifacts: $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n'}}]

[{'type': 'tool_use', 'id': 'toolu_bdrk_011PsBcV7etyrBcadHoDScdE', 'name': 'Write', 'input': {'file_path': '/dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus/bash/neuron/compile_embedding.bash', 'content': '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\nSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\nREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"\nCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/config"\n\n# Load configuration\nif [[ ! -f "$CONFIG_DIR/embedding.env" ]]; then\n    echo "Error: $CONFIG_DIR/embedding.env not found" >&2\n    exit 1\nfi\nsource "$CONFIG_DIR/embedding.env"\n\n# Docker detection\nif [[ -f /.dockerenv ]] || grep -q docker /proc/1/cgroup 2>/dev/null; then\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-python3}"\nelse\n    PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"\nfi\n\n# Resolve paths\n[[ "$EMBEDDING_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" == /* ]] || EMBEDDING_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$REPO_ROOT/$EMBEDDING_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\nmkdir -p "$EMBEDDING_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n\n# Model source (download if needed)\nLOCAL_MODEL_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/$MODEL"\nif [[ ! -d "$LOCAL_MODEL_DIR" ]]; then\n    echo "Downloading model $MODEL..."\n    "$PYTHON_BIN" -c "from huggingface_hub import snapshot_download; snapshot_download(\'$MODEL\', local_dir=\'$LOCAL_MODEL_DIR\')"\nfi\n\necho "=== Qwen3-Embedding-8B Compilation (Optimum Neuron) ==="\necho "Model:       $MODEL"\necho "TP Size:     $TP_SIZE"\necho "Batch Size:  $BATCH_SIZE"\necho "Seq Length:  $SEQUENCE_LENGTH"\necho "Instance:    $INSTANCE_TYPE"\necho "Artifacts:   $EMBEDDING_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\necho ""\n\n"$PYTHON_BIN" -m optimum.commands.export.neuronx \\\n    --model "$LOCAL_MODEL_DIR" \\\n    --task feature-extraction \\\n    --batch_size "$BATCH_SIZE" \\\n    --sequence_length "$SEQUENCE_LENGTH" \\\n    --auto_cast matmul \\\n    --instance_type "$INSTANCE_TYPE" \\\n    --tensor_parallel_size "$TP_SIZE" \\\n    "$EMBEDDING_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n\necho ""\necho "=== Compilation Complete ==="\necho "Artifacts: $EMBEDDING_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS"\n'}}]

---

## ASSISTANT (2026-07-21 18:29:41)

[{'type': 'tool_use', 'id': 'toolu_bdrk_01QKPWHiu3emzhdwt4vdDJvv', 'name': 'Write', 'input': {'file_path': '/dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus/bash/neuron/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash', 'content': '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\n# Tongyi multi-replica cluster for large machines (trn2.48xlarge etc.)\n# Each replica gets its own port and Neuron core range.\n\nSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\nREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"\nCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/config"\n\nsource "$CONFIG_DIR/tongyi.env"\n\n# Cluster settings (override via environment)\nFIRST_PORT="${FIRST_PORT:-6008}"\nTONGYI_REPLICAS="${TONGYI_REPLICAS:-1}"\nEMBEDDING_PORT="${EMBEDDING_PORT:-6030}"\nLOG_DIR="${LOG_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/logs/neuron-servers}"\nCORES_PER_REPLICA="${CORES_PER_REPLICA:-$TP_SIZE}"\n\nmkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"\n\nPIDS=()\n\ncleanup() {\n    for pid in "${PIDS[@]}"; do\n        if kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then\n            kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true\n            wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true\n        fi\n    done\n}\ntrap cleanup EXIT\ntrap \'exit 130\' INT TERM\n\necho "=== Tongyi-30B Cluster ==="\necho "Replicas:    $TONGYI_REPLICAS"\necho "Port range:  $FIRST_PORT-$((FIRST_PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS - 1))"\necho "Embedding:   $EMBEDDING_PORT"\necho "Cores/rep:   $CORES_PER_REPLICA"\necho ""\n\n# Start embedding server\nPORT="$EMBEDDING_PORT" \\\n    bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_embedding.bash" \\\n    > "$LOG_DIR/embedding-${EMBEDDING_PORT}.log" 2>&1 &\nPIDS+=($!)\n\n# Start planning replicas\nfor ((replica = 0; replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; replica++)); do\n    port=$((FIRST_PORT + replica))\n    core_start=$((replica * CORES_PER_REPLICA))\n    core_end=$((core_start + CORES_PER_REPLICA - 1))\n    cores="${core_start}-${core_end}"\n\n    echo "Starting replica $replica: port=$port cores=$cores"\n\n    PORT="$port" \\\n    NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$cores" \\\n        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash" \\\n        > "$LOG_DIR/tongyi-${port}.log" 2>&1 &\n    PIDS+=($!)\ndone\n\n# Wait for all replicas to be ready\necho ""\necho "Waiting for servers..."\nfor ((replica = 0; replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; replica++)); do\n    port=$((FIRST_PORT + replica))\n    until curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models" >/dev/null 2>&1; do\n        sleep 5\n    done\n    echo "  Replica $replica ready (port $port)"\ndone\n\nuntil curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:${EMBEDDING_PORT}/health" >/dev/null 2>&1; do\n    sleep 5\ndone\necho "  Embedding ready (port $EMBEDDING_PORT)"\n\necho ""\necho "=== All servers ready ==="\nwait\n'}}]

---

[{'type': 'tool_use', 'id': 'toolu_bdrk_0163kgcdMSezM6YGaHEwrgCy', 'name': 'Write', 'input': {'file_path': '/dev3/zigeng/BrowseComp-Plus/bash/neuron/serve_judge_cluster.bash', 'content': '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\n\n# Judge multi-replica cluster for large machines (trn2.48xlarge etc.)\n# Each replica gets its own port and Neuron core range.\n\nSCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"\nREPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"\nCONFIG_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/config"\n\nsource "$CONFIG_DIR/judge.env"\n\n# Cluster settings (override via environment)\nFIRST_PORT="${FIRST_PORT:-8032}"\nJUDGE_REPLICAS="${JUDGE_REPLICAS:-1}"\nLOG_DIR="${LOG_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/logs/neuron-servers}"\nCORES_PER_REPLICA="${CORES_PER_REPLICA:-$TP_SIZE}"\n\nmkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"\n\nPIDS=()\n\ncleanup() {\n    for pid in "${PIDS[@]}"; do\n        if kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then\n            kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true\n            wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true\n        fi\n    done\n}\ntrap cleanup EXIT\ntrap \'exit 130\' INT TERM\n\necho "=== Qwen3-32B Judge Cluster ==="\necho "Replicas:    $JUDGE_REPLICAS"\necho "Port range:  $FIRST_PORT-$((FIRST_PORT + JUDGE_REPLICAS - 1))"\necho "Cores/rep:   $CORES_PER_REPLICA"\necho ""\n\n# Start judge replicas\nfor ((replica = 0; replica < JUDGE_REPLICAS; replica++)); do\n    port=$((FIRST_PORT + replica))\n    core_start=$((replica * CORES_PER_REPLICA))\n    core_end=$((core_start + CORES_PER_REPLICA - 1))\n    cores="${core_start}-${core_end}"\n\n    echo "Starting replica $replica: port=$port cores=$cores"\n\n    PORT="$port" \\\n    NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$cores" \\\n        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_judge.bash" \\\n        > "$LOG_DIR/judge-${port}.log" 2>&1 &\n    PIDS+=($!)\ndone\n\n# Wait for all replicas to be ready\necho ""\necho "Waiting for servers..."\nfor ((replica = 0; replica < JUDGE_REPLICAS; replica++)); do\n    port=$((FIRST_PORT + replica))\n    until curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models" >/dev/null 2>&1; do\n        sleep 5\n    done\n    echo "  Replica $replica ready (port $port)"\ndone\n\necho ""\necho "=== All judge servers ready ==="\nwait\n'}}]

[{'type': 'text', 'text': '✅ **重构完成！**\n\n## 最终结构\n\n```\nbash/neuron/\n├── config/\n│   ├── tongyi.env                  # ← 编辑这里设置 Tongyi 参数\n│   ├── tongyi_neuron_config.json   # ← 编辑这里设置 bucket 配置\n│   ├── judge.env                   # ← Judge 参数\n│   ├── judge_neuron_config.json    # ← Judge bucket 配置\n│   ├── embedding.env               # ← Embedding 参数\n│   └── README.md                   # 完整配置说明文档\n├── compile_tongyi.bash             # 编译 Tongyi\n├── compile_judge.bash              # 编译 Judge\n├── compile_embedding.bash          # 编译 Embedding\n├── serve_tongyi.bash               # 单实例 Tongyi 服务\n├── serve_judge.bash                # 单实例 Judge 服务\n├── serve_embedding.bash            # Embedding 服务\n├── serve_tongyi_cluster.bash       # 集群（大机器用）\n├── serve_judge_cluster.bash        # 集群（大机器用）\n├── n_tongyi.bash                   # 不动\n├── n_tongyi_get.bash               # 不动\n├── run_tongyi_neuron.bash          # 不动\n├── evaluate_with_neuron_judge.bash # 不动\n├── check_neuron_env.bash           # 不动\n├── download_*.bash                 # 不动\n└── archive-pre-dlc/                # 旧脚本归档\n```\n\n## 使用方式\n\n```bash\n# 1. 编辑配置（你自己设定参数）\nvim bash/neuron/config/tongyi.env\nvim bash/neuron/config/tongyi_neuron_config.json\n\n# 2. 在容器内编译\nbash bash/neuron/compile_tongyi.bash\n\n# 3. 在容器内启动服务\nbash bash/neuron/serve_tongyi.bash\n```\n\n所有脚本语法检查通过，JSON配置文件有效。你现在可以编辑 `config/` 里的文件来设置自己的参数，然后手动测试编译和服务。'}]

## ASSISTANT (2026-07-21 18:31:51)

[{'type': 'text', 'text': '根据 vLLM-Neuron 0.21.0 的 [reference-configuration.md](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-neuron/blob/release-0.21.0.1.0.0/docs/guides/reference-configuration.md)，feature 设置方式如下：\n\n## Feature 配置总览\n\n所有 Neuron 特有 feature 都通过两个地方设置：\n\n1. **`config/*_neuron_config.json`** — `neuron_config` 内的字段\n2. **`config/*.env`** — vLLM CLI 参数（通过环境变量）\n\n---\n\n### 1. Segmented Prefill（分段预填充）\n\n**当前已启用。** 设置 `kv_segment_size_buckets` 即开启：\n\n```json\n{\n  "neuron_config": {\n    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [4096],\n    "kv_segment_size_buckets": [4096]\n  }\n}\n```\n\n**约束：** `kv_segment_size_buckets` **必须等于** `num_batched_tokens_buckets`（kernel限制）。\n\n**效果：** 长 prompt（比如128K）被切成4096-token的段逐步处理，而非一次性加载。\n\n**禁用：** 删掉 `kv_segment_size_buckets` 行即可（此时 prefill 必须一次性处理完整prompt）。\n\n---\n\n### 2. Prefix Caching（APC，自动前缀缓存）\n\n在 `.env` 中通过 vLLM 标准参数控制：\n\n```bash\n# tongyi.env — 已默认开启\n# 相当于 --enable-prefix-caching（0.21.0 默认 ON）\n```\n\nserve 脚本中已写死 `--enable-prefix-caching`。\n\n**相关参数：**\n- `BLOCK_SIZE=32` — KV block 粒度，更小=更精确复用，但开销更大\n- `NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=4000` — 总 block 数，越多能缓存的前缀越长\n\n---\n\n### 3. Async Scheduling（异步调度）\n\n**0.21.0 默认开启**，不需要额外设置。\n\n**前提条件：** 必须有 `on_device_sampling_config`（当前已配置）。\n\n**禁用（不建议）：** 在 serve 脚本的 vLLM 命令中加 `--no-async-scheduling`。\n\n---\n\n### 4. On-Device Sampling（设备端采样）\n\n当前配置：\n\n```json\n"on_device_sampling_config": {\n  "all_greedy": true\n}\n```\n\n**选项：**\n\n| 配置 | 用途 |\n|------|------|\n| `{"all_greedy": true}` | 全贪心采样（确定性输出） |\n| `{"temperature": "0.7"}` | Temperature 采样（注意值是字符串） |\n\n---\n\n### 5. Decode Context Length Buckets（decode 优化）\n\n可选。当前 tongyi 配置**未启用**，添加方式：\n\n```json\n{\n  "neuron_config": {\n    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [4096],\n    "num_seqs_buckets": [1],\n    "kv_segment_size_buckets": [4096],\n    "decode_context_length_buckets": [4096, 8192, 16384, 32768],\n    "on_device_sampling_config": {\n      "all_greedy": true\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n**效果：** 为不同 KV cache 长度编译不同的 decode kernel，避免总是用 max_model_len 大小的NEFF。\n\n**权衡：** 更多 buckets = 更多编译时间，但 decode 更快。\n\n---\n\n### 6. KV Cache FP8 量化\n\n在 serve 脚本中加 `--kv-cache-dtype fp8`。\n\n**需要：** 模型有 calibrated scales（预先量化校准过的 checkpoint）。  \n**效果：** KV cache 内存减半。\n\n---\n\n### 7. Prompt Embeddings\n\n在 serve 脚本中加 `--enable-prompt-embeds`。\n\n**用途：** 允许传入预计算的 embedding 向量而非 token IDs。\n\n---\n\n## 完整示例：所有 feature 打开\n\n```json\n{\n  "neuron_config": {\n    "num_batched_tokens_buckets": [4096],\n    "num_seqs_buckets": [1, 2],\n    "kv_segment_size_buckets": [4096],\n    "decode_context_length_buckets": [4096, 8192, 16384, 32768],\n    "on_device_sampling_config": {\n      "all_greedy": true\n    }\n  }\n}\n```\n\n```bash\n# .env 中\nBLOCK_SIZE=32\nNUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=4000\n\n# serve 脚本中已包含\n--enable-prefix-caching        # APC\n--additional-config "$JSON"    # segmented prefill + sampling + decode buckets\n\n# 可选追加（需修改 serve 脚本）\n--no-async-scheduling          # 禁用 async（不建议）\n--kv-cache-dtype fp8           # KV 量化（需校准 checkpoint）\n--enable-prompt-embeds         # prompt embedding 输入\n```\n\n---\n\n## 你当前的配置状态\n\n| Feature | 状态 | 开关位置 |\n|---------|------|----------|\n| Segmented Prefill | ✅ 已启用 | `kv_segment_size_buckets` in JSON |\n| Prefix Caching (APC) | ✅ 已启用 | `--enable-prefix-caching` in serve script |\n| Async Scheduling | ✅ 已启用 | 默认ON，需 `on_device_sampling_config` |\n| On-Device Sampling | ✅ Greedy | `on_device_sampling_config` in JSON |\n| Decode Context Buckets | ❌ 未启用 | 添加 `decode_context_length_buckets` to JSON |\n| KV FP8 | ❌ 未启用 | 添加 `--kv-cache-dtype fp8` to serve script |\n| Prompt Embeddings | ❌ 未启用 | 添加 `--enable-prompt-embeds` to serve script |\n\n想调整哪个 feature 我帮你改配置文件。'}]
